title: HIPO: Instruction Hierarchy via Constrained Reinforcement Learning
authors: Keru Chen, Jun Luo, Sen Lin, Yingbin Liang, Alvaro Velasquez, Nathaniel Bastian, Shaofeng Zou
abstract: Hierarchical Instruction Following (HIF) refers to the problem of prompting large language models with a priority-ordered stack of instructions. Standard methods like RLHF and DPO typically fail in this problem since they mainly optimize for a single objective, failing to explicitly enforce system prompt compliance. Meanwhile, supervised fine-tuning relies on mimicking filtered, compliant data, which fails to establish the priority asymmetry at the algorithmic level. In this paper, we introduce \textsc{HIPO}, a novel alignment framework that formulates HIF as a Constrained Markov Decision Process. \textsc{HIPO} elevates system prompts from mere input context to strict algorithmic boundaries. Using a primal-dual safe reinforcement learning approach, the algorithm dynamically enforces system prompt compliance as an explicit constraint, maximizing user utility strictly within this feasible region. Extensive evaluations across diverse model architectures (e.g., Qwen, Phi, Llama) demonstrate that \textsc{HIPO} significantly improves both system compliance and user utility. Furthermore, mechanistic analysis reveals that this constrained optimization autonomously drives the model to shift its attention toward long-range system tokens, providing a principled foundation for reliable LLM deployment in complex workflows.
title_zh: HIPO：通过约束强化学习实现的指令层次结构
abstract_zh: 层次化指令遵循（Hierarchical Instruction Following, HIF）是指向大型语言模型提供一个按优先级排序的指令堆栈时所面临的挑战。标准方法如基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）和直接偏好优化（DPO）通常在此问题上表现不佳，因为它们主要针对单一目标进行优化，未能显式地强制执行系统提示的合规性。而监督微调则依赖于对经过筛选的合规数据进行模仿，无法在算法层面建立优先级的不对称性。本文提出一种名为 \textsc{HIPO} 的新型对齐框架，将 HIF 问题建模为一个约束型马尔可夫决策过程。\textsc{HIPO} 将系统提示从简单的输入上下文提升为严格的算法边界。通过采用原始-对偶安全强化学习方法，该算法将系统提示的合规性作为显式约束动态施加，确保用户效用在该可行区域内最大化。在多种模型架构（如 Qwen、Phi、Llama）上的大量实验表明，\textsc{HIPO} 显著提升了系统合规性与用户效用。此外，机制分析揭示，这种约束优化能够自主引导模型将注意力转向长距离的系统标记，为复杂工作流中大模型的可靠部署提供了坚实的理论基础。

title: SWE-QA-Pro: A Representative Benchmark and Scalable Training Recipe for Repository-Level Code Understanding
authors: Songcheng Cai, Zhiheng Lyu, Yuansheng Ni, Xiangchao Chen, Baichuan Zhou, Shenzhe Zhu, Yi Lu, Haozhe Wang, Chi Ruan, Benjamin Schneider, Weixu Zhang, Xiang Li, Andy Zheng, Yuyu Zhang, Ping Nie, Wenhu Chen
abstract: Agentic repository-level code understanding is essential for automating complex software engineering tasks, yet the field lacks reliable benchmarks. Existing evaluations often overlook the long tail topics and rely on popular repositories where Large Language Models (LLMs) can cheat via memorized knowledge. To address this, we introduce SWE-QA-Pro, a benchmark constructed from diverse, long-tail repositories with executable environments. We enforce topical balance via issue-driven clustering to cover under-represented task types and apply a rigorous difficulty calibration process: questions solvable by direct-answer baselines are filtered out. This results in a dataset where agentic workflows significantly outperform direct answering (e.g., a ~13-point gap for Claude Sonnet 4.5), confirming the necessity of agentic codebase exploration. Furthermore, to tackle the scarcity of training data for such complex behaviors, we propose a scalable synthetic data pipeline that powers a two-stage training recipe: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) followed by Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF). This approach allows small open models to learn efficient tool usage and reasoning. Empirically, a Qwen3-8B model trained with our recipe surpasses GPT-4o by 2.3 points on SWE-QA-Pro and substantially narrows the gap to state-of-the-art proprietary models, demonstrating both the validity of our evaluation and the effectiveness of our agentic training workflow.
title_zh: SWE-QA-Pro：面向仓库级代码理解的代表性基准与可扩展训练方案
abstract_zh:
代理型仓库级代码理解对于自动化复杂软件工程任务至关重要，但该领域缺乏可靠的评估基准。现有的评估方法往往忽视了长尾主题，且依赖于热门仓库，导致大型语言模型（LLMs）可通过记忆化知识“作弊”。为解决这一问题，我们提出了SWE-QA-Pro——一个基于多样化、长尾仓库构建的基准数据集，并配备了可执行环境。通过基于问题驱动的聚类方法实现主题平衡，以覆盖那些被低估的任务类型；同时采用严格的难度校准流程，过滤掉仅靠直接回答基线即可解决的问题。结果表明，在该数据集上，代理式工作流显著优于直接回答方法（例如，Claude Sonnet 4.5在性能上存在约13个百分点的差距），充分证明了代理式代码库探索的必要性。

此外，针对此类复杂行为训练数据稀缺的问题，我们提出了一种可扩展的合成数据生成管道，并设计了一个两阶段训练方案：监督微调（SFT）后接基于AI反馈的强化学习（RLAIF）。该方法使小型开源模型能够学习高效的工具使用与推理能力。实证结果显示，使用该训练方案训练的Qwen3-8B模型在SWE-QA-Pro上的表现比GPT-4o高出2.3分，并显著缩小了与顶尖专有模型之间的差距，充分验证了我们评估基准的有效性以及代理式训练流程的卓越性能。

title: Toward Reliable Scientific Visualization Pipeline Construction with Structure-Aware Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
authors: Guanghui Zhao, Zhe Wang, Yu Dong, Guan Li, GuiHua Shan
abstract: Scientific visualization pipelines encode domain-specific procedural knowledge with strict execution dependencies, making their construction sensitive to missing stages, incorrect operator usage, or improper ordering. Thus, generating executable scientific visualization pipelines from natural-language descriptions remains challenging for large language models, particularly in web-based environments where visualization authoring relies on explicit code-level pipeline assembly. In this work, we investigate the reliability of LLM-based scientific visualization pipeline generation, focusing on vtk.js as a representative web-based visualization library. We propose a structure-aware retrieval-augmented generation workflow that provides pipeline-aligned vtk.js code examples as contextual guidance, supporting correct module selection, parameter configuration, and execution order. We evaluate the proposed workflow across multiple multi-stage scientific visualization tasks and LLMs, measuring reliability in terms of pipeline executability and human correction effort. To this end, we introduce correction cost as metric for the amount of manual intervention required to obtain a valid pipeline. Our results show that structured, domain-specific context substantially improves pipeline executability and reduces correction cost. We additionally provide an interactive analysis interface to support human-in-the-loop inspection and systematic evaluation of generated visualization pipelines.
title_zh: 基于结构感知的检索增强型大语言模型的可靠科学可视化流程构建
abstract_zh: 科学可视化流程通过严格的执行依赖关系编码了特定领域的过程性知识，因此其构建对缺失步骤、操作符使用错误或顺序不当极为敏感。这使得大型语言模型从自然语言描述中生成可执行的科学可视化流程仍面临挑战，尤其是在基于网页的环境中，可视化创作依赖于显式的代码级流程组装。本文研究了基于大语言模型（LLM）的科学可视化流程生成的可靠性，以vtk.js作为典型的基于网页的可视化库进行考察。我们提出了一种结构感知的检索增强生成工作流，通过提供与流程对齐的vtk.js代码示例作为上下文引导，支持模块的正确选择、参数配置以及执行顺序的合理安排。我们在多个多阶段科学可视化任务和不同LLM上评估了该工作流的性能，从流程可执行性及人工修正成本两个方面衡量其可靠性。为此，我们引入“修正成本”这一指标，用于衡量获得有效流程所需的手动干预程度。实验结果表明，结构化且领域特定的上下文显著提升了流程的可执行性，并大幅降低了修正成本。此外，我们还提供了一个交互式分析界面，支持人机协同的流程检查与系统性评估，从而提升生成流程的质量与可信度。

title: POaaS: Minimal-Edit Prompt Optimization as a Service to Lift Accuracy and Cut Hallucinations on On-Device sLLMs
authors: Jungwoo Shim, Dae Won Kim, Sun Wook Kim, Soo Young Kim, Myungcheol Lee, Jae-geun Cha, Hyunhwa Choi
abstract: Small language models (sLLMs) are increasingly deployed on-device, where imperfect user prompts--typos, unclear intent, or missing context--can trigger factual errors and hallucinations. Existing automatic prompt optimization (APO) methods were designed for large cloud LLMs and rely on search that often produces long, structured instructions; when executed under an on-device constraint where the same small model must act as optimizer and solver, these pipelines can waste context and even hurt accuracy. We propose POaaS, a minimal-edit prompt optimization layer that routes each query to lightweight specialists (Cleaner, Paraphraser, Fact-Adder) and merges their outputs under strict drift and length constraints, with a conservative skip policy for well-formed prompts. Under a strict fixed-model setting with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, POaaS improves both task accuracy and factuality while representative APO baselines degrade them, and POaaS recovers up to +7.4% under token deletion and mixup. Overall, per-query conservative optimization is a practical alternative to search-heavy APO for on-device sLLMs.
title_zh: POaaS：作为服务的最小编辑提示优化，以提升本地小规模语言模型的准确性并减少幻觉
abstract_zh: 小语言模型（sLLMs）正越来越多地部署在设备端，而用户输入的不完美提示——如拼写错误、意图模糊或上下文缺失——常常引发事实性错误和幻觉。现有的自动提示优化（APO）方法最初是为大型云端大模型设计的，依赖于搜索机制，通常会产生冗长且结构化的指令；当在设备端受限环境下运行时，同一小型模型需同时承担优化器与求解器的角色，这类流程会浪费上下文空间，甚至降低准确性。我们提出POaaS，一种极简编辑的提示优化层，将每个查询路由至轻量级专业模块（清理器、改写器、事实补充器），并在严格的漂移与长度约束下合并其输出，对已格式良好的提示采用保守跳过策略。在固定模型设置下（使用Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct），POaaS在提升任务准确率和事实性的同时，显著优于代表性APO基线方法，后者反而导致性能下降；在令牌删除和混合扰动场景下，POaaS最高可恢复达+7.4%的性能。总体而言，针对设备端sLLMs，每查询的保守式优化是一种比依赖搜索的APO更实用的替代方案。

title: EngGPT2: Sovereign, Efficient and Open Intelligence
authors: G. Ciarfaglia, A. Rosanova, S. Cipolla, J. Bartoli, A. Di Domenico, C. Fioroni, A. Fontana, M. R. Scoleri, M. I. Mone, D. Franchi, M. C. Del Gaudio, F. Picariello, M. Gabusi, S. Bonura, V. Morreale, I. Bailo
abstract: EngGPT2-16B-A3B is the latest iteration of Engineering Group's Italian LLM and it's built to be a Sovereign, Efficient and Open model. EngGPT2 is trained on 2.5 trillion tokens - less than Qwen3's 36T or Llama3's 15T - and delivers performance on key benchmarks, including MMLU-Pro, GSM8K, IFEval and HumanEval, comparable to dense models in the 8B-16B range, while requiring one-fifth to half of the inference power, and between one-tenth to one-sixth of the training data and consequent needed training power. Designed as a trained-from-scratch Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, EngGPT2 features 16 billion parameters with 3 billion active per inference, with expert sizes positioned between those used in GPT-OSS and Qwen3. Approximately 25% of its training corpus consists of Italian-language data, to deliver strong capabilities for European and Italian NLP tasks among models of similar scale. This efficiency aims to position EngGPT2 as a key contributor to the growing portfolio of open-weight European models, combining performance and efficiency with full alignment to the EU AI Act. EngGPT2 is also a single model capable of multiple reasoning modes: non-reasoning, reasoning in Italian or English, and turbo-reasoning (a concise, bullet-point style reasoning available in both languages designed for real-time reasoning use cases). EngGPT2 aims to set a new standard for resource-conscious, high-performance LLMs tailored to European and Italian contexts.
title_zh: EngGPT2：主权、高效且开放的智能
abstract_zh:
EngGPT2-16B-A3B 是工程集团最新推出的意大利语大语言模型，旨在打造一款自主、高效且开源的模型。该模型在 2.5 万亿个标记（tokens）上进行训练，远低于 Qwen3 的 36 万亿或 Llama3 的 15 万亿，但在 MMLU-Pro、GSM8K、IFEval 和 HumanEval 等关键基准测试中表现优异，其性能可与参数量在 80 亿至 160 亿之间的密集型模型相媲美，同时推理所需算力仅为后者的五分之一至一半，训练数据量仅为十分之一至六分之一，相应所需的训练算力也大幅降低。EngGPT2 采用从零开始训练的专家混合（Mixture-of-Experts, MoE）架构，拥有 160 亿总参数，每次推理时激活约 30 亿参数，专家规模介于 GPT-OSS 与 Qwen3 所用规模之间。其训练语料库中约有 25% 为意大利语数据，使其在同等规模模型中具备出色的欧洲及意大利自然语言处理能力。这一高效率设计旨在使 EngGPT2 成为日益丰富的开源欧洲模型组合中的关键成员，兼具高性能与高效率，并全面符合欧盟《人工智能法案》（EU AI Act）的要求。

此外，EngGPT2 是一个单一模型，支持多种推理模式：非推理模式、以意大利语或英语进行推理，以及“极速推理”（turbo-reasoning）——一种简洁的要点式推理方式，支持双语输出，专为实时推理应用场景而设计。EngGPT2 致力于为面向欧洲及意大利语境的资源敏感型、高性能大语言模型树立新标准。

title: Beyond Grading Accuracy: Exploring Alignment of TAs and LLMs
authors: Matthijs Jansen op de Haar, Nacir Bouali, Faizan Ahmed
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the potential of open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) for grading Unified Modeling Language (UML) class diagrams. In contrast to existing work, which primarily evaluates proprietary LLMs, we focus on non-proprietary models, making our approach suitable for universities where transparency and cost are critical. Additionally, existing studies assess performance over complete diagrams rather than individual criteria, offering limited insight into how automated grading aligns with human evaluation. To address these gaps, we propose a grading pipeline in which student-generated UML class diagrams are independently evaluated by both teaching assistants (TAs) and LLMs. Grades are then compared at the level of individual criteria. We evaluate this pipeline through a quantitative study of 92 UML class diagrams from a software design course, comparing TA grades against assessments produced by six popular open-source LLMs. Performance is measured across individual criterion, highlighting areas where LLMs diverge from human graders. Our results show per-criterion accuracy of up to 88.56% and a Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 0.78, representing a substantial improvement over previous work while using only open-source models. We also explore the concept of an optimal model that combines the best-performing LLM per criterion. This optimal model achieves performance close to that of a TA, suggesting a possible path toward a mixed-initiative grading system. Our findings demonstrate that open-source LLMs can effectively support UML class diagram grading by explicitly identifying grading alignment. The proposed pipeline provides a practical approach to manage increasing assessment workloads with growing student counts.
title_zh: 超越评分准确率：探索助教与大语言模型的一致性
abstract_zh: 本文研究了开源大型语言模型（LLMs）在统一建模语言（UML）类图评分中的潜力。与现有研究主要评估专有模型不同，我们聚焦于非专有模型，使本方法更适合高校环境——在透明度和成本方面具有重要意义。此外，现有研究通常基于完整的UML图进行性能评估，而非针对具体评分标准，因而难以揭示自动化评分与人工评分之间的对齐程度。为弥补这些不足，我们提出了一种评分流程：学生生成的UML类图由教学助理（TAs）和LLMs分别独立评分，随后在单项评分标准层面进行对比分析。我们通过一项定量研究，对来自软件设计课程的92个UML类图进行了评估，将教学助理的评分结果与六种主流开源LLMs的评估结果进行比较。评估结果按单项标准展开，揭示了LLMs与人类评分者之间存在的差异。研究结果显示，单项标准下的准确率最高可达88.56%，皮尔逊相关系数最高达0.78，相较于以往工作实现了显著提升，且仅使用开源模型。我们还探讨了“最优模型”的概念——即每项标准下表现最佳的LLM组合而成的模型。该最优模型的性能接近教学助理水平，表明未来可能实现一种人机协同的混合式评分系统。研究结果表明，开源LLMs能够有效支持UML类图的评分，关键在于明确识别评分一致性。所提出的评分流程为应对学生人数增长带来的评估压力提供了一种切实可行的解决方案。

title: SpecSteer: Synergizing Local Context and Global Reasoning for Efficient Personalized Generation
authors: Hang Lv, Sheng Liang, Hao Wang, Yongyue Zhang, Hongchao Gu, Wei Guo, Defu Lian, Yong Liu, Enhong Chen
abstract: Realizing personalized intelligence faces a core dilemma: sending user history to centralized large language models raises privacy concerns, while on-device small language models lack the reasoning capacity required for high-quality generation. Our pilot study shows that purely local enhancements remain insufficient to reliably bridge this gap. We therefore propose SpecSteer, an asymmetric collaborative inference framework that synergizes private on-device context with cloud-scale reasoning. SpecSteer casts collaboration as Bayesian knowledge fusion and repurposes speculative decoding as a distributed alignment protocol, yielding a Draft--Verify--Recover pipeline: the on-device model drafts personalized sequences; the cloud validates via a ratio-based mechanism that decouples reasoning verification from private context, filtering logical flaws without accessing raw user context; upon rejection, a steering recovery injects local intent during correction. Experiments demonstrate that SpecSteer successfully closes the reasoning gap and achieves superior personalized generation performance, while delivering a 2.36x speedup over standard baselines.
title_zh: SpecSteer：协同局部上下文与全局推理以实现高效个性化生成
abstract_zh: 实现个性化智能面临一个核心难题：将用户历史数据发送至中心化的大型语言模型会引发隐私担忧，而部署在本地的小型语言模型又缺乏高质量生成所需的推理能力。我们的初步研究发现，仅依靠本地增强无法可靠地弥合这一差距。为此，我们提出SpecSteer——一种非对称协同推理框架，通过融合私有的本地上下文与云端的规模化推理能力，实现高效协作。SpecSteer将协作过程建模为贝叶斯知识融合，并重新利用推测解码作为分布式对齐协议，构建出“草稿—验证—恢复”（Draft--Verify--Recover）的处理流程：本地模型生成个性化的序列草稿；云端通过基于比例的机制进行验证，将推理验证与私有上下文解耦，从而在不访问原始用户数据的前提下过滤逻辑错误；当草稿被拒绝时，通过“引导恢复”机制注入本地意图以完成修正。实验表明，SpecSteer成功填补了推理能力的鸿沟，在实现更优个性化生成性能的同时，相较标准基线实现了2.36倍的加速效果。

title: Exploring different approaches to customize language models for domain-specific text-to-code generation
authors: Luís Freire, Fernanda A. Andaló, Nicki Skafte Detlefsen
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in generating executable code from natural language descriptions. However, general-purpose models often struggle in specialized programming contexts where domain-specific libraries, APIs, or conventions must be used. Customizing smaller open-source models offers a cost-effective alternative to relying on large proprietary systems. In this work, we investigate how smaller language models can be adapted for domain-specific code generation using synthetic datasets. We construct datasets of programming exercises across three domains within the Python ecosystem: general Python programming, Scikit-learn machine learning workflows, and OpenCV-based computer vision tasks. Using these datasets, we evaluate three customization strategies: few-shot prompting, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and parameter-efficient fine-tuning using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Performance is evaluated using both benchmark-based metrics and similarity-based metrics that measure alignment with domain-specific code. Our results show that prompting-based approaches such as few-shot learning and RAG can improve domain relevance in a cost-effective manner, although their impact on benchmark accuracy is limited. In contrast, LoRA-based fine-tuning consistently achieves higher accuracy and stronger domain alignment across most tasks. These findings highlight practical trade-offs between flexibility, computational cost, and performance when adapting smaller language models for specialized programming tasks.
title_zh: 探索针对特定领域文本到代码生成的定制化语言模型的不同方法
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在从自然语言描述生成可执行代码方面展现了强大的能力。然而，在需要使用领域特定库、API 或编程惯例的专门编程场景中，通用型模型往往表现不佳。相比之下，定制较小的开源模型提供了一种比依赖大型专有系统更具成本效益的替代方案。在本研究中，我们探讨了如何利用合成数据集将小型语言模型适配于特定领域的代码生成任务。我们构建了涵盖 Python 生态系统三个领域的编程练习数据集：通用 Python 编程、Scikit-learn 机器学习工作流以及基于 OpenCV 的计算机视觉任务。基于这些数据集，我们评估了三种定制策略：少样本提示（few-shot prompting）、检索增强生成（RAG）以及采用低秩适应（LoRA）的参数高效微调。性能评估结合了基于基准的指标和基于相似性的度量，以衡量生成代码与领域特定代码的一致性。实验结果表明，基于提示的方法（如少样本学习和 RAG）能够在低成本下有效提升代码的领域相关性，但对基准测试准确率的提升有限。相反，基于 LoRA 的微调方法在大多数任务中均表现出更高的准确率和更强的领域一致性。这些发现揭示了在将小型语言模型应用于专业化编程任务时，灵活性、计算成本与性能之间的实际权衡。

title: ODIN-Based CPU-GPU Architecture with Replay-Driven Simulation and Emulation
authors: Nij Dorairaj, Debabrata Chatterjee, Hong Wang, Hong Jiang, Alankar Saxena, Altug Koker, Thiam Ern Lim, Cathrane Teoh, Chuan Yin Loo, Bishara Shomar, Anthony Lester
abstract: Integration of CPU and GPU technologies is a key enabler for modern AI and graphics workloads, combining control-oriented processing with massive parallel compute capability. As systems evolve toward chiplet-based architectures, pre-silicon validation of tightly coupled CPU-GPU subsystems becomes increasingly challenging due to complex validation framework setup, large design scale, high concurrency, non-deterministic execution, and intricate protocol interactions at chiplet boundaries, often resulting in long integration cycles. This paper presents a replay-driven validation methodology developed during the integration of a CPU subsystem, multiple Xe GPU cores, and a configurable Network-on-Chip (NoC) within a foundational SoC building block targeting the ODIN integrated chiplet architecture. By leveraging deterministic waveform capture and replay across both simulation and emulation using a single design database, complex GPU workloads and protocol sequences can be reproduced reliably at the system level. This approach significantly accelerates debug, improves integration confidence, and enables end-to-end system boot and workload execution within a single quarter, demonstrating the effectiveness of replay-based validation as a scalable methodology for chiplet-based systems.
title_zh: 基于ODIN的CPU-GPU架构及其驱动重放的仿真与模拟
abstract_zh: CPU与GPU技术的融合是现代人工智能和图形处理工作负载的关键推动力，它将以控制为导向的处理能力与大规模并行计算能力相结合。随着系统向基于芯粒（chiplet）的架构演进，对紧密耦合的CPU-GPU子系统进行预硅验证变得日益复杂，主要由于验证框架搭建复杂、设计规模庞大、高并发性、非确定性执行以及芯粒间复杂的协议交互，常常导致集成周期过长。本文介绍了一种在集成CPU子系统、多个Xe GPU核心及可配置网络-on-芯片（NoC）于基础SoC构建模块过程中所开发的基于重放的验证方法，该模块面向ODIN集成芯粒架构。通过利用单一设计数据库，在仿真与原型验证（emulation）中实现确定性波形捕获与重放，能够可靠地在系统级重现复杂的GPU工作负载和协议序列。该方法显著加速了调试过程，提升了集成信心，并实现了在单个季度内完成端到端系统启动与工作负载执行，充分证明了基于重放的验证是一种适用于芯粒架构系统的可扩展有效方法。

title: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
authors: Jian Yang, Wei Zhang, Jiajun Wu, Junhang Cheng, Shawn Guo, Haowen Wang, Weicheng Gu, Yaxin Du, Joseph Li, Fanglin Xu, Yizhi Li, Lin Jing, Yuanbo Wang, Yuhan Gao, Ruihao Gong, Chuan Hao, Ran Tao, Aishan Liu, Tuney Zheng, Ganqu Cui, Zhoujun Li, Mingjie Tang, Chenghua Lin, Wayne Xin Zhao, Xianglong Liu, Ming Zhou, Bryan Dai, Weifeng Lv
abstract: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks. Nevertheless, their performance degrades significantly in industrial scenarios that require reasoning about hardware semantics, specialized language constructs, and strict resource constraints. To address these challenges, we introduce InCoder-32B (Industrial-Coder-32B), the first 32B-parameter code foundation model unifying code intelligence across chip design, GPU kernel optimization, embedded systems, compiler optimization, and 3D modeling. By adopting an efficient architecture, we train InCoder-32B from scratch with general code pre-training, curated industrial code annealing, mid-training that progressively extends context from 8K to 128K tokens with synthetic industrial reasoning data, and post-training with execution-grounded verification. We conduct extensive evaluation on 14 mainstream general code benchmarks and 9 industrial benchmarks spanning 4 specialized domains. Results show InCoder-32B achieves highly competitive performance on general tasks while establishing strong open-source baselines across industrial domains.
title_zh: InCoder-32B：面向工业场景的代码基础模型
abstract_zh: 近期的大规模代码语言模型在通用编程任务上取得了显著进展。然而，在需要推理硬件语义、专用语言结构以及严格资源约束的工业场景中，其性能会显著下降。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了 InCoder-32B（Industrial-Coder-32B），这是首个参数量达320亿的代码基础模型，能够统一涵盖芯片设计、GPU内核优化、嵌入式系统、编译器优化和3D建模等五大工业领域中的代码智能能力。通过采用高效的架构设计，我们从零开始训练 InCoder-32B：首先进行通用代码预训练，随后引入经过精心筛选的工业代码渐进式训练（annealing），在训练过程中逐步将上下文长度从8K扩展至128K token，并使用合成的工业推理数据进行中间阶段训练，最后通过基于执行结果验证的后训练进一步提升模型能力。我们在14个主流通用代码基准和涵盖4个专业领域的9个工业基准上进行了广泛评估。结果表明，InCoder-32B在通用任务上表现极具竞争力，同时在工业领域建立了强大的开源基准。

title: FactorEngine: A Program-level Knowledge-Infused Factor Mining Framework for Quantitative Investment
authors: Qinhong Lin, Ruitao Feng, Yinglun Feng, Zhenxin Huang, Yukun Chen, Zhongliang Yang, Linna Zhou, Binjie Fei, Jiaqi Liu, Yu Li
abstract: We study alpha factor mining, the automated discovery of predictive signals from noisy, non-stationary market data-under a practical requirement that mined factors be directly executable and auditable, and that the discovery process remain computationally tractable at scale. Existing symbolic approaches are limited by bounded expressiveness, while neural forecasters often trade interpretability for performance and remain vulnerable to regime shifts and overfitting. We introduce FactorEngine (FE), a program-level factor discovery framework that casts factors as Turing-complete code and improves both effectiveness and efficiency via three separations: (i) logic revision vs. parameter optimization, (ii) LLM-guided directional search vs. Bayesian hyperparameter search, and (iii) LLM usage vs. local computation. FE further incorporates a knowledge-infused bootstrapping module that transforms unstructured financial reports into executable factor programs through a closed-loop multi-agent extraction-verification-code-generation pipeline, and an experience knowledge base that supports trajectory-aware refinement (including learning from failures). Across extensive backtests on real-world OHLCV data, FE produces factors with substantially stronger predictive stability and portfolio impact-for example, higher IC/ICIR (and Rank IC/ICIR) and improved AR/Sharpe, than baseline methods, achieving state-of-the-art predictive and portfolio performance.
title_zh: FactorEngine：一种面向量化投资的程序级知识增强因子挖掘框架
abstract_zh: 我们研究阿尔法因子挖掘，即在噪声大、非平稳的市场数据中自动发现具有预测能力的信号——同时满足实际应用中的关键要求：所挖掘的因子必须可直接执行且可审计，且整个发现过程在大规模场景下仍保持计算上的可行性。现有的符号化方法受限于表达能力的边界，而神经网络预测模型往往以牺牲可解释性换取性能，且对市场状态突变和过拟合依然敏感。为此，我们提出 FactorEngine（FE），一种面向程序级因子发现的框架，将因子表示为图灵完备的代码，并通过三个关键分离机制提升有效性和效率：(i) 逻辑修正与参数优化的分离，(ii) 基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的方向性搜索与贝叶斯超参数搜索的分离，以及 (iii) LLM 使用与本地计算的分离。FE 进一步集成了一个知识增强型自举模块，通过闭环的多智能体提取-验证-代码生成流程，将非结构化的金融报告转化为可执行的因子程序；同时还构建了一个经验知识库，支持基于轨迹感知的迭代优化（包括从失败中学习）。在真实世界 OHLCV 数据上的大量回测表明，FE 所生成的因子展现出显著更强的预测稳定性与投资组合影响力——例如更高的 IC/ICIR（及 Rank IC/ICIR）和改进的 AR/Sharpe 比率——优于基准方法，实现了当前最先进的预测性能与投资组合表现。

title: Toward Experimentation-as-a-Service in 5G/6G: The Plaza6G Prototype for AI-Assisted Trials
authors: Sergio Barrachina-Muñoz, Marc Carrascosa-Zamacois, Horacio Bleda, Umair Riaz, Yasir Maqsood, Xavier Calle, Selva Vía, Miquel Payaró, Josep Mangues-Bafalluy
abstract: This paper presents Plaza6G, the first operational Experiment-as-a-Service (ExaS) platform unifying cloud resources with next-generation wireless infrastructure. Developed at CTTC in Barcelona, Plaza6G integrates GPU-accelerated compute clusters, multiple 5G cores, both open-source (e.g., Free5GC) and commercial (e.g., Cumucore), programmable RANs, and physical or emulated user equipment under unified orchestration. In Plaza6G, the experiment design requires minimal expertise as it is expressed in natural language via a web portal or a REST API. The web portal and REST API are enhanced with a Large Language Model (LLM)-based assistant, which employs retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for up-to-date experiment knowledge and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for continuous domain fine-tuning. Over-the-air (OTA) trials leverage a four-chamber anechoic facility and a dual-site outdoor 5G network operating in sub-6~GHz and mmWave bands. Demonstrations include automated CI/CD integration with sub-ten-minute setup and interactive OTA testing under programmable propagation conditions. Machine-readable experiment descriptors ensure reproducibility, while future work targets policy-aware orchestration, safety validation, and federated testbed integration toward open, reproducible wireless experimentation.
title_zh: 面向5G/6G的实验即服务：Plaza6G原型系统助力人工智能辅助试验
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了Plaza6G，这是首个将云资源与下一代无线基础设施统一的可操作实验即服务（ExaS）平台。Plaza6G由巴塞罗那的CTTC开发，集成了GPU加速计算集群、多个5G核心网（包括开源的Free5GC和商用的Cumucore）、可编程的无线接入网（RAN），以及物理或模拟的用户设备，并在统一的编排框架下实现协同工作。在Plaza6G中，实验设计仅需极少的专业知识，可通过Web门户或REST API以自然语言形式进行表达。Web门户和REST API均集成了基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能助手，该助手采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术获取最新的实验知识，并利用低秩适配（LoRA）技术实现持续的领域微调。空中接口（OTA）测试依托于四室消声室设施，以及运行在Sub-6 GHz和毫米波频段的双站点室外5G网络。演示内容包括子十分钟内完成的自动化CI/CD集成，以及在可编程传播条件下进行的交互式OTA测试。机器可读的实验描述符确保了实验的可复现性，未来工作将聚焦于具备策略感知能力的编排、安全验证，以及联邦测试床集成，以推动开放、可复现的无线实验生态发展。

title: Decoding the Critique Mechanism in Large Reasoning Models
authors: Hoang Phan, Quang H. Nguyen, Hung T. Q. Le, Xiusi Chen, Heng Ji, Khoa D. Doan
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) exhibit backtracking and self-verification mechanisms that enable them to revise intermediate steps and reach correct solutions, yielding strong performance on complex logical benchmarks. We hypothesize that such behaviors are beneficial only when the model has sufficiently strong "critique" ability to detect its own mistakes. This work systematically investigates how current LRMs recover from errors by inserting arithmetic mistakes in their intermediate reasoning steps. Notably, we discover a peculiar yet important phenomenon: despite the error propagating through the chain-of-thought (CoT), resulting in an incorrect intermediate conclusion, the model still reaches the correct final answer. This recovery implies that the model must possess an internal mechanism to detect errors and trigger self-correction, which we refer to as the hidden critique ability. Building on feature space analysis, we identify a highly interpretable critique vector representing this behavior. Extensive experiments across multiple model scales and families demonstrate that steering latent representations with this vector improves the model's error detection capability and enhances the performance of test-time scaling at no extra training cost. Our findings provide a valuable understanding of LRMs' critique behavior, suggesting a promising direction to control and improve their self-verification mechanism. Our code is available at https://github.com/mail-research/lrm-critique-vectors.
title_zh: 解码大型推理模型中的批评机制
abstract_zh: 大型推理模型（LRMs）展现出回溯与自我验证机制，能够修正中间步骤并得出正确答案，从而在复杂的逻辑基准测试中表现出色。我们假设，此类行为仅在模型具备足够强的“批判”能力以识别自身错误时才具有实际益处。本文系统性地研究了当前LRMs如何从错误中恢复，方法是在其推理链的中间步骤中插入算术错误。值得注意的是，我们发现了一个奇特但重要的现象：尽管错误在思维链（CoT）中传播，导致中间结论错误，模型仍能得出正确的最终答案。这种恢复能力表明，模型必然具备一种内部机制来检测错误并触发自我修正，我们将其称为“隐式批判能力”。基于特征空间分析，我们识别出一个高度可解释的批判向量，用以表征这一行为。在多个模型规模和架构上的大量实验表明，通过该向量引导潜在表示，可在无需额外训练成本的情况下提升模型的错误检测能力，并增强测试时缩放的效果。我们的研究结果为理解LRMs的批判行为提供了重要洞见，指明了一条控制和改进其自我验证机制的有前景方向。代码已公开于 https://github.com/mail-research/lrm-critique-vectors。

title: Generative AI for Quantum Circuits and Quantum Code: A Technical Review and Taxonomy
authors: Juhani Merilehto
abstract: We review thirteen generative systems and five supporting datasets for quantum circuit and quantum code generation, identified through a structured scoping review of Hugging Face, arXiv, and provenance tracing (January-February 2026). We organize the field along two axes: artifact type (Qiskit code, OpenQASM programs, circuit graphs); crossed with training regime (supervised fine-tuning, verifier-in-the-loop RL, diffusion/graph generation, agentic optimization); and systematically apply a three-layer evaluation framework covering syntactic validity, semantic correctness, and hardware executability. The central finding is that while all reviewed systems address syntax and most address semantics to some degree, none reports end-to-end evaluation on quantum hardware (Layer 3b), leaving a significant gap between generated circuits and practical deployment. Scope note: quantum code refers throughout to quantum program artifacts (QASM, Qiskit); we do not cover generation of quantum error-correcting codes (QEC).
title_zh: 生成式人工智能在量子电路与量子代码中的应用：技术综述与分类
abstract_zh: 我们回顾了十三个生成系统及五个支持性数据集，这些系统与数据集均通过针对 Hugging Face、arXiv 以及溯源追踪（2026年1月至2月）的结构化范围综述所识别。我们从两个维度对这一领域进行组织：一是生成物类型（Qiskit 代码、OpenQASM 程序、电路图），二是训练方式（监督微调、验证器在环的强化学习、扩散/图生成、代理优化）；并系统地应用了一个三层评估框架，涵盖语法正确性、语义正确性以及硬件可执行性。核心发现是：尽管所有被评系统均关注语法问题，且大多数在一定程度上解决了语义问题，但没有任何一个系统报告在量子硬件上的端到端评估（第3b层），导致生成电路与实际部署之间存在显著差距。说明：本文中“量子代码”始终指代量子程序类产物（如 QASM、Qiskit）；不包括量子纠错码（QEC）的生成。

title: On the Transfer of Collinearity to Computer Vision
authors: Frederik Beuth, Danny Kowerko
abstract: Collinearity is a visual perception phenomenon in the human brain that amplifies spatially aligned edges arranged along a straight line. However, it is vague for which purpose humans might have this principle in the real-world, and its utilization in computer vision and engineering applications even is a largely unexplored field. In this work, our goal is to transfer the collinearity principle to computer vision, and we explore the potential usages of this novel principle for computer vision applications. We developed a prototype model to exemplify the principle, then tested it systematically, and benchmarked it in the context of four use cases. Our cases are selected to spawn a broad range of potential applications and scenarios: sketching the combination of collinearity with deep learning (case I and II), using collinearity with saliency models (case II), and as a feature detector (case I). In the first use case, we found that collinearity is able to improve the fault detection of wafers and obtain a performance increase by a factor 1.24 via collinearity (decrease of the error rate from 6.5% to 5.26%). In the second use case, we test the defect recognition in nanotechnology materials and achieve a performance increase by 3.2x via collinearity (deep learning, error from 21.65% to 6.64%), and also explore saliency models. As third experiment, we cover occlusions; while as fourth experiment, we test ImageNet and observe that it might not be very beneficial for ImageNet. Therefore, we can assemble a list of scenarios for which collinearity is beneficial (wafers, nanotechnology, occlusions), and for what is not beneficial (ImageNet). Hence, we infer collinearity might be suitable for industry applications as it helps if the image structures of interest are man-made because they often consist of lines. Our work provides another tool for CV, hope to capture the power of human processing.
title_zh: 共线性在计算机视觉中的传递
abstract_zh: 共线性是一种人类大脑中的视觉感知现象，能够增强沿直线空间排列的边缘。然而，这种机制在现实世界中究竟有何用途仍不明确，其在计算机视觉与工程应用中的潜力也几乎未被探索。本文旨在将共线性原理引入计算机视觉领域，并探讨该新原理在计算机视觉应用中的潜在用途。我们构建了一个原型模型以展示该原理，随后系统地进行了测试，并在四个应用场景中进行了基准对比。所选案例旨在涵盖广泛的应用前景与场景：结合共线性与深度学习（案例I和II）、利用共线性与显著性模型（案例II），以及作为特征检测器（案例I）。在第一个应用案例中，我们发现共线性可有效提升晶圆缺陷检测性能，使错误率从6.5%降低至5.26%，性能提升达1.24倍；在第二个案例中，我们测试了纳米材料中的缺陷识别任务，通过共线性实现3.2倍的性能提升（错误率由21.65%降至6.64%），并进一步探索了显著性模型的应用。第三个实验聚焦于遮挡情况下的表现，第四个实验则在ImageNet数据集上进行测试，结果表明共线性在ImageNet上的增益并不明显。因此，我们总结出共线性在特定场景下具有优势（如晶圆、纳米技术、遮挡场景），而在其他场景（如ImageNet）中则效果有限。由此推断，共线性可能更适合工业应用，尤其当目标图像结构为人工构造时——因为这类结构通常包含大量线条。本研究为计算机视觉提供了一种新的工具，希望借此捕捉人类视觉处理的强大能力。

title: TRACE: Evaluating Execution Efficiency of LLM-Based Code Translation
authors: Zhihao Gong, Zeyu Sun, Dong Huang, Qingyuan Liang, Jie M. Zhang, Dan Hao
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially improved the functional correctness of code translation, the critical dimension of \textit{execution efficiency} remains overlooked. We present \textbf{\textsc{trace}}, the first benchmark to explicitly assess efficiency in LLM-translated code. \textsc{trace} includes 1,000 efficiency-critical tasks across C++, Java, and Python, each augmented with stress tests that reveal efficiency degradations often overlooked by small-scale tests. Using \textsc{trace}, we conduct an extensive evaluation of 28 representative LLMs and highlight several key insights: 1) Correctness is not a reliable proxy for efficiency: the correctness leader \textit{Claude-4-think} achieves only mid-level time efficiency, outperformed by smaller open-source LLMs such as \textit{Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct}. 2) Inefficiency is both prevalent and patterned: 23.5\% of correct translations exhibit pronounced inefficiency, distributed across algorithmic faults (11.9\%), language construct mismatches (66.4\%), and resource mismanagement (21.7\%). 3) Inference-time prompt strategies bring only modest improvements, suggesting that current LLMs lack intrinsic efficiency awareness. Together, our results establish efficiency as an essential dimension of code translation and position \textsc{trace} as a principled foundation for efficiency-oriented evaluation.
title_zh: 追踪：评估基于大语言模型的代码翻译执行效率
abstract_zh:
尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在提升代码翻译的功能正确性方面取得了显著进展，但一个关键维度——**执行效率**——仍被严重忽视。我们提出了首个专门评估LLM生成代码执行效率的基准测试工具——\textbf{\textsc{trace}}。\textsc{trace} 包含涵盖 C++、Java 和 Python 的 1,000 个对效率敏感的任务，每个任务均配有压力测试用例，能够揭示小型测试常忽略的性能退化问题。

基于 \textsc{trace}，我们对 28 个具有代表性的 LLMs 进行了全面评估，并得出以下几点关键发现：  
1）**正确性并非效率的可靠代理**：在正确性上领先的模型 \textit{Claude-4-think} 在时间效率方面仅处于中等水平，反而被一些规模更小的开源模型（如 \textit{Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct}）所超越。  
2）**低效现象普遍存在且具有规律性**：在所有正确翻译结果中，有 23.5% 显现出显著的效率缺陷，其成因分布如下：算法层面错误占 11.9%，语言结构不匹配占 66.4%，资源管理不当占 21.7%。  
3）推理时的提示策略（prompt strategies）仅带来有限改进，表明当前 LLMs 缺乏内在的效率感知能力。

综上所述，我们的研究确立了“执行效率”作为代码翻译的核心评价维度，并将 \textsc{trace} 建立为面向效率优化的系统性评估基础。

title: SseRex: Practical Symbolic Execution of Solana Smart Contracts
authors: Tobias Cloosters, Pascal Winkler, Jens-Rene Giesen, Ghassan Karame, Lucas Davi
abstract: Solana is rapidly gaining traction among smart contract developers and users. However, its growing adoption has been accompanied by a series of major security incidents, which have spurred research into automated analysis techniques for Solana smart contracts. Unfortunately, existing approaches do not address the unique and complex account model of Solana. In this paper, we propose SseRex, the first symbolic execution vulnerability detection approach for finding Solana-specific bugs such as missing owner checks, missing signer checks, and missing key checks, as well as arbitrary cross-program invocations. Our evaluation of 8,714 bytecode-only contracts shows that our approach outperforms existing approaches and identifies potential bugs in 467 different contracts. Additionally, we analyzed 120 open-source Solana projects and conducted in-depth case studies on four of them. Our findings reveal that subtle, easily overlooked issues often serve as the root cause of severe exploits, further highlighting the need for specialized analysis tools like SseRex.
title_zh: SseRex：Solana智能合约的实用符号执行
abstract_zh: Solana正迅速赢得智能合约开发者和用户的青睐。然而，其日益增长的采用率也伴随着一系列重大安全事件，这促使研究者们致力于开发针对Solana智能合约的自动化分析技术。遗憾的是，现有的方法未能解决Solana独特且复杂的账户模型问题。本文提出SseRex，这是首个用于检测Solana特有漏洞的符号执行漏洞检测方法，能够发现诸如缺失所有者检查、缺失签名者检查、缺失密钥检查以及任意跨程序调用等特定问题。对8,714个仅含字节码的合约进行评估表明，我们的方法优于现有技术，并在467个不同合约中发现了潜在漏洞。此外，我们还分析了120个开源Solana项目，并对其中四个项目进行了深入案例研究。研究结果表明，那些细微且容易被忽视的问题往往是严重漏洞的根本原因，进一步凸显了像SseRex这样专用分析工具的必要性。

title: Prompts Blend Requirements and Solutions: From Intent to Implementation
authors: Shalini Chakraborty, Jan-Philipp Steghöfer
abstract: AI coding assistants are reshaping software development by shifting focus from writing code to formulating prompts. In chat-focused approaches such as vibe coding, prompts become the primary arbiter between human intent and executable software. While Requirements Engineering (RE) emphasizes capturing, validating, and evolving requirements, current prompting practices remain informal and adhoc. We argue that prompts should be understood as lightweight, evolving requirement artifacts that blend requirements with solution guidance. We propose a conceptual model decomposing prompts into three interrelated components: Functionality and Quality (the requirement), General Solutions (architectural strategy and technology choices) and Specific Solutions (implementation-level constraints). We assess this model using existing prompts, examining how these components manifest in practice. Based on this model and the initial assessment, we formulate four hypotheses: prompts evolve toward specificity, evolution varies by user characteristics, engineers using prompting engage in increased requirement validation and verification, and progressive prompt refinement yields higher code quality. Our vision is to empirically evaluate these hypotheses through analysis of real-world AI-assisted development, with datasets, corpus analysis, and controlled experiments, ultimately deriving best practices for requirements-aware prompt engineering. By rethinking prompts through the lens of RE, we position prompting not merely as a technical skill, but as a central concern for software engineering's future.
title_zh: 提示词融合需求与解决方案：从意图到实现
abstract_zh:
AI编程助手正在重塑软件开发，将重点从编写代码转向设计提示（prompt）。在以聊天为核心的开发方式（如“氛围编码”vibe coding）中，提示成为连接人类意图与可执行软件的主要中介。尽管需求工程（Requirements Engineering, RE）强调对需求的捕获、验证与演进，但当前的提示实践仍处于非正式且随意的状态。我们认为，提示应被理解为轻量级、持续演进的需求载体，它融合了需求本身与解决方案的指导信息。

为此，我们提出一个概念性模型，将提示分解为三个相互关联的组成部分：  
1. **功能与质量**（即需求内容）；  
2. **通用解决方案**（包括架构策略和技术选型）；  
3. **具体解决方案**（实现层面的约束条件）。

我们通过分析现有提示实例，评估该模型在实际中的表现，考察这些组件如何在实践中体现。基于此模型及初步评估结果，我们提出四个假设：  
- 提示会逐步向更具体的表达演化；  
- 演化过程因用户特征而异；  
- 使用提示的工程师会进行更多需求验证与确认活动；  
- 逐步优化提示的过程能够带来更高的代码质量。

我们的愿景是通过真实世界中AI辅助开发的数据分析、语料库研究和受控实验，实证检验上述假设，最终提炼出面向需求感知的提示工程最佳实践。通过将提示置于需求工程的视角下重新思考，我们不仅将其视为一项技术技能，更将其定位为未来软件工程的核心议题。

title: Dialect-Agnostic SQL Parsing via LLM-Based Segmentation
authors: Junwen An, Kabilan Mahathevan, Manuel Rigger
abstract: SQL is a widely adopted language for querying data, which has led to the development of various SQL analysis and rewriting tools. However, due to the diversity of SQL dialects, such tools often fail when encountering unrecognized dialect-specific syntax. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in understanding SQL queries, their inherent limitations in handling hierarchical structures and hallucination risks limit their direct applicability in parsing. To address these limitations, we propose SQLFlex, a novel query rewriting framework that integrates grammar-based parsing with LLM-based segmentation to parse diverse SQL dialects robustly. Our core idea is to decompose hierarchical parsing to sequential segmentation tasks, which better aligns with the strength of LLMs and improves output reliability through validation checks. Specifically, SQLFlex uses clause-level segmentation and expression-level segmentation as two strategies that decompose elements on different levels of a query. We extensively evaluated SQLFlex on both real-world use cases and in a standalone evaluation. In SQL linting, SQLFlex outperforms SQLFluff in ANSI mode by 63.68% in F1 score while matching its dialect-specific mode performance. In test-case reduction, SQLFlex outperforms SQLess by up to 10 times in simplification rate. In the standalone evaluation, it parses 91.55% to 100% of queries across eight distinct dialects, outperforming all baseline parsers. We believe SQLFlex can serve as a foundation for many query analysis and rewriting use cases.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型分段的方言无差别SQL解析
abstract_zh: SQL 是一种广泛采用的数据查询语言，这促使了各类 SQL 分析与重写工具的发展。然而，由于 SQL 语法方言的多样性，这些工具在遇到不支持的方言特定语法时常常失效。尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在理解 SQL 查询方面展现出巨大潜力，但其在处理层级结构方面的固有局限性以及幻觉风险，限制了其在解析任务中的直接应用。为解决这些问题，我们提出了 SQLFlex——一种创新的查询重写框架，该框架将基于语法的解析与基于 LLM 的分段技术相结合，能够稳健地解析多种 SQL 方言。我们的核心思想是将复杂的层级解析任务分解为一系列顺序的分段任务，这一设计更契合 LLM 的优势，并通过验证机制提升输出的可靠性。具体而言，SQLFlex 采用了两种策略：条款级分段和表达式级分段，分别对查询的不同层次元素进行分解。我们在真实应用场景和独立评估中对 SQLFlex 进行了全面测试。在 SQL 代码检查方面，SQLFlex 在 ANSI 模式下的 F1 分数比 SQLFluff 提高了 63.68%，同时在方言特定模式下性能相当；在测试用例简化方面，SQLFlex 的简化率最高可达 SQLess 的 10 倍；在独立评估中，它在八个不同方言上成功解析了 91.55% 至 100% 的查询，显著优于所有基线解析器。我们认为，SQLFlex 可以成为众多查询分析与重写任务的坚实基础。

title: Open-Source Reproduction and Explainability Analysis of Corrective Retrieval Augmented Generation
authors: Surya Vardhan Yalavarthi
abstract: Corrective Retrieval Augmented Generation (CRAG) improves the robustness of RAG systems by evaluating retrieved document quality and triggering corrective actions. However, the original implementation relies on proprietary components including the Google Search API and closed model weights, limiting reproducibility. In this work, we present a fully open-source reproduction of CRAG, replacing proprietary web search with the Wikipedia API and the original LLaMA-2 generator with Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct. We evaluate on PopQA and ARC-Challenge, demonstrating that our open-source pipeline achieves comparable performance to the original system. Furthermore, we contribute the first explainability analysis of CRAG's T5-based retrieval evaluator using SHAP, revealing that the evaluator primarily relies on named entity alignment rather than semantic similarity. Our analysis identifies key failure modes including domain transfer limitations on science questions. All code and results are available at https://github.com/suryayalavarthi/crag-reproduction.
title_zh: 纠错检索增强生成的开源复现与可解释性分析
abstract_zh: 纠正性检索增强生成（Corrective Retrieval Augmented Generation, CRAG）通过评估检索文档的质量并触发纠正措施，提升了RAG系统的鲁棒性。然而，原始实现依赖于专有的组件，包括Google搜索API和封闭的模型权重，限制了其可复现性。在本工作中，我们提出了CRAG的完全开源复现版本，将专有的网络搜索替换为Wikipedia API，并用Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct替代原有的LLaMA-2生成器。我们在PopQA和ARC-Challenge数据集上进行了评估，结果表明，我们的开源系统在性能上与原系统相当。此外，我们首次对CRAG中基于T5的检索评估器进行了可解释性分析，采用SHAP方法揭示该评估器主要依赖命名实体对齐，而非语义相似性。我们的分析还识别出关键的失败模式，例如在科学类问题上的领域迁移能力有限。所有代码和实验结果均可在 https://github.com/suryayalavarthi/crag-reproduction 获取。

title: Execution-Grounded Credit Assignment for GRPO in Code Generation
authors: Abhijit Kumar, Natalya Kumar, Shikhar Gupta
abstract: Critic-free reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves code generation by optimizing unit-test pass rates, but GRPO-style updates suffer from coarse credit assignment: a single outcome signal is spread uniformly across long programs even when failure stems from a localized semantic error. We propose Execution-Grounded Credit Assignment (EGCA), which localizes GRPO updates using execution traces. For programs that satisfy algorithmic constraints but fail tests, EGCA executes the candidate and a canonical reference solution (curated once offline; used for analysis, not supervision) under identical instrumentation, identifies the earliest semantic divergence, and assigns advantage only to the corresponding token span while masking downstream tokens. EGCA is a drop-in modification requiring no critic, auxiliary loss, or learned verifier, yielding 82.1% pass@1 on HumanEval (+3.1 over GRPO) and 68.9% on MBPP (+1.5) with 18% wall-clock overhead.
title_zh: 代码生成中基于执行的GRPO信用分配
abstract_zh: 无需批评者（critic-free）的可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）通过优化单元测试通过率来提升代码生成效果，但GRPO风格的更新机制存在粗粒度信用分配问题：即使失败源于局部语义错误，单一的结果信号也会被均匀分布到整个长程序中。为此，我们提出执行基础信用分配（EGCA），利用执行轨迹对GRPO更新进行局部化处理。对于满足算法约束但测试失败的程序，EGCA在相同仪器化条件下执行候选代码与一个预先离线整理好的标准参考解（仅用于分析，不作为监督信号），识别出最早的语义分歧点，并仅将优势值分配给对应的标记片段，同时屏蔽下游标记。EGCA是一种即插即用的改进方案，无需批评者、辅助损失或训练过的验证器，可在HumanEval上实现82.1%的pass@1（较GRPO提升3.1个百分点），在MBPP上达到68.9%（提升1.5个百分点），且仅带来18%的时钟时间开销。

title: Dimensional Type Systems and Deterministic Memory Management: Design-Time Semantic Preservation in Native Compilation
authors: Houston Haynes
abstract: We present a compilation framework in which dimensional type annotations persist through multi-stage MLIR lowering, enabling the compiler to jointly resolve numeric representation selection and deterministic memory management as coeffect properties of a single program semantic graph (PSG). Dimensional inference determines value ranges; value ranges determine representation selection; representation selection determines word width and memory footprint; and memory footprint, combined with escape classification, determines allocation strategy and cross-target transfer fidelity. The Dimensional Type System (DTS) extends Hindley-Milner unification with constraints drawn from finitely generated abelian groups, yielding inference that is decidable in polynomial time, complete, and principal. Where conventional systems erase dimensional annotations before code generation, DTS carries them as compilation metadata through each lowering stage, making them available where representation and memory placement decisions occur. Deterministic Memory Management (DMM), formalized as a coeffect discipline within the same graph, unifies escape analysis and memory placement with the dimensional framework. Escape analysis classifies value lifetimes into four categories (stack-scoped, closure-captured, return-escaping, byref-escaping), each mapping to a verified allocation strategy. We identify implications for auto-differentiation: the dimensional algebra is closed under the chain rule, and forward-mode gradient computation exhibits a coeffect signature that the framework can verify. The practical consequence is a development environment where escape diagnostics, allocation strategy, representation fidelity, and cache locality estimation are design-time views over the compilation graph.
title_zh: 维度类型系统与确定性内存管理：原生编译中的设计时语义保持
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种编译框架，其中维度类型注解在多阶段MLIR降级过程中得以保留，使编译器能够将数值表示选择与确定性内存管理作为单一程序语义图（PSG）的共效应属性进行联合求解。维度推断确定值的取值范围；取值范围决定表示形式的选择；表示形式的选择决定字宽和内存占用；而内存占用结合逃逸分类，则决定分配策略及跨目标传输的保真度。维度类型系统（DTS）在Hindley-Milner合一的基础上，引入了来自有限生成阿贝尔群的约束，使得推断在多项式时间内可判定、完备且具有主解性质。与传统系统在代码生成前擦除维度注解不同，DTS将这些注解作为编译元数据贯穿于每一级降级过程，使其在表示选择和内存布局决策时仍可被使用。确定性内存管理（DMM）以同一图结构中的共效应体系形式加以形式化，将逃逸分析与内存布局统一到维度框架之中。逃逸分析将值的生命周期划分为四类（栈作用域、闭包捕获、返回逃逸、引用逃逸），每类均对应一种经过验证的分配策略。我们还揭示了其对自动微分的影响：维度代数在链式法则下保持封闭，前向模式梯度计算展现出可被该框架验证的共效应签名。实际效果是，开发环境提供了一系列设计时视图，包括逃逸诊断、分配策略、表示保真度以及缓存局部性估计，全部基于编译图进行呈现。

title: From Natural Language to Executable Option Strategies via Large Language Models
authors: Haochen Luo, Zhengzhao Lai, Junjie Xu, Yifan Li, Tang Pok Hin, Yuan Zhang, Chen Liu
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, yet translating natural-language trading intents into correct option strategies remains challenging. Real-world option design requires reasoning over massive, multi-dimensional option chain data with strict constraints, which often overwhelms direct generation methods. We introduce the Option Query Language (OQL), a domain-specific intermediate representation that abstracts option markets into high-level primitives under grammatical rules, enabling LLMs to function as reliable semantic parsers rather than free-form programmers. OQL queries are then validated and executed deterministically by an engine to instantiate executable strategies. We also present a new dataset for this task and demonstrate that our neuro-symbolic pipeline significantly improves execution accuracy and logical consistency over direct baselines.
title_zh: 通过大型语言模型实现从自然语言到可执行期权策略的转化
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在通用代码生成方面表现出色，但将自然语言描述的交易意图准确转化为期权策略仍面临挑战。现实世界中的期权设计需要对海量、多维度的期权链数据进行推理，并满足严格的约束条件，这往往超出直接生成方法的处理能力。为此，我们提出了期权查询语言（Option Query Language, OQL），一种领域特定的中间表示形式，它在语法规则下将期权市场抽象为高层级的基本单元，使LLM能够作为可靠的语义解析器，而非自由发挥的编程者。OQL查询随后由一个引擎进行确定性验证与执行，以生成可执行的策略。我们还构建了一个新的数据集用于该任务，并实证表明，我们的神经符号化流程在执行准确性和逻辑一致性方面显著优于直接基线方法。

title: Learning to Predict, Discover, and Reason in High-Dimensional Discrete Event Sequences
authors: Hugo Math
abstract: Electronic control units (ECUs) embedded within modern vehicles generate a large number of asynchronous events known as diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs). These discrete events form complex temporal sequences that reflect the evolving health of the vehicle's subsystems. In the automotive industry, domain experts manually group these codes into higher-level error patterns (EPs) using Boolean rules to characterize system faults and ensure safety. However, as vehicle complexity grows, this manual process becomes increasingly costly, error-prone, and difficult to scale. Notably, the number of unique DTCs in a modern vehicle is on the same order of magnitude as the vocabulary of a natural language, often numbering in the tens of thousands. This observation motivates a paradigm shift: treating diagnostic sequences as a language that can be modeled, predicted, and ultimately explained. Traditional statistical approaches fail to capture the rich dependencies and do not scale to high-dimensional datasets characterized by thousands of nodes, large sample sizes, and long sequence lengths. Specifically, the high cardinality of categorical event spaces in industrial logs poses a significant challenge, necessitating new machine learning architectures tailored to such event-driven systems. This thesis addresses automated fault diagnostics by unifying event sequence modeling, causal discovery, and large language models (LLMs) into a coherent framework for high-dimensional event streams. It is structured in three parts, reflecting a progressive transition from prediction to causal understanding and finally to reasoning for vehicle diagnostics. Consequently, we introduce several Transformer-based architectures for predictive maintenance, scalable sample- and population-level causal discovery frameworks and a multi-agent system that automates the synthesis of Boolean EP rules.
title_zh: 学习在高维离散事件序列中进行预测、发现与推理
abstract_zh: 现代汽车中嵌入的电子控制单元（ECUs）会产生大量异步事件，这些事件被称为诊断故障码（DTCs）。这些离散事件构成了复杂的时序序列，反映了车辆各子系统健康状态的动态演变。在汽车工业领域，领域专家通常通过布尔规则手动将这些故障码归类为更高层次的错误模式（EPs），以表征系统故障并保障安全。然而，随着车辆复杂性的不断增加，这种人工处理方式变得愈发成本高昂、易出错且难以扩展。值得注意的是，现代车辆中唯一DTC的数量与自然语言词汇量处于同一数量级，通常可达数万之多。这一现象促使我们进行范式转变：将诊断序列视为一种可建模、可预测乃至可解释的语言。传统的统计方法无法捕捉事件间的丰富依赖关系，也难以应对具有数千个节点、大规模样本和长序列长度的高维数据集。特别是工业日志中类别事件空间的高基数性带来了显著挑战，亟需设计专门针对此类事件驱动系统的新型机器学习架构。本论文通过整合事件序列建模、因果发现与大语言模型（LLMs），构建了一个统一的框架，用于高维事件流的自动化故障诊断。论文分为三个部分，呈现出从预测到因果理解，再到推理的渐进式演进过程。为此，本文提出了多种基于Transformer的架构，用于预测性维护；开发了可扩展的样本级与总体级因果发现框架；并构建了一个多智能体系统，实现了布尔错误模式规则的自动化合成。

title: More Rounds, More Noise: Why Multi-Turn Review Fails to Improve Cross-Context Verification
authors: Song Tae-Eun
abstract: Cross-Context Review (CCR) improves LLM verification by separating production and review into independent sessions. A natural extension is multi-turn review: letting the reviewer ask follow-up questions, receive author responses, and review again. We call this Dynamic Cross-Context Review (D-CCR). In a controlled experiment with 30 artifacts and 150 injected errors, we tested four D-CCR variants against the single-pass CCR baseline. Single-pass CCR (F1 = 0.376) significantly outperformed all multi-turn variants, including D-CCR-2b with question-and-answer exchange (F1 = 0.303, $p < 0.001$, $d = -0.59$). Multi-turn review increased recall (+0.08) but generated 62% more false positives (8.5 vs. 5.2), collapsing precision from 0.30 to 0.20. Two mechanisms drive this degradation: (1) false positive pressure -- reviewers in later rounds fabricate findings when the artifact's real errors have been exhausted, and (2) Review Target Drift -- reviewers provided with prior Q&A exchanges shift from reviewing the artifact to critiquing the conversation itself. Independent re-review without prior context (D-CCR-2c) performed worst (F1 = 0.263), confirming that mere repetition degrades rather than helps. The degradation stems from false positive pressure in additional rounds, not from information amount -- within multi-turn conditions, more information actually helps (D-CCR-2b > D-CCR-2a). The problem is not what the reviewer sees, but that reviewing again invites noise.
title_zh: 更多轮次，更多噪声：为何多轮评论无法提升跨上下文验证
abstract_zh: 跨上下文审查（CCR）通过将生产与审查过程分离为独立会话，提升了大语言模型（LLM）的验证效果。一个自然的延伸是多轮审查：允许审查者提出后续问题，接收作者回复，并再次进行审查。我们称此为动态跨上下文审查（D-CCR）。在一项受控实验中，我们使用30个样本和150处人为注入的错误，将四种D-CCR变体与单轮CCR基线进行了对比。结果显示，单轮CCR（F1 = 0.376）显著优于所有多轮变体，包括包含问答交互的D-CCR-2b（F1 = 0.303，$p < 0.001$，$d = -0.59$）。尽管多轮审查提高了召回率（+0.08），但虚假阳性数量增加了62%（从5.2增至8.5），导致精确率从0.30骤降至0.20。这一性能下降由两个机制驱动：（1）虚假阳性压力——在后续轮次中，当样本的真实错误已被耗尽时，审查者会虚构发现；（2）审查目标漂移——在获得先前问答交流信息后，审查者逐渐从审查原始样本转向批评对话本身。不依赖先前上下文的独立重审（D-CCR-2c）表现最差（F1 = 0.263），证实单纯的重复不仅无助于提升，反而会损害效果。性能退化并非源于信息量增加，而是来自额外审查轮次带来的噪声干扰——在多轮条件下，更多信息实际上有助于提升效果（D-CCR-2b > D-CCR-2a）。问题的关键不在于审查者看到了什么，而在于“再次审查”这一行为本身引入了噪声。

title: Malicious Or Not: Adding Repository Context to Agent Skill Classification
authors: Florian Holzbauer, David Schmidt, Gabriel Gegenhuber, Sebastian Schrittwieser, Johanna Ullrich
abstract: Agent skills extend local AI agents, such as Claude Code or Open Claw, with additional functionality, and their popularity has led to the emergence of dedicated skill marketplaces, similar to app stores for mobile applications. Simultaneously, automated skill scanners were introduced, analyzing the skill description available in SKILL.md, to verify their benign behavior. The results for individual market places mark up to 46.8% of skills as malicious. In this paper, we present the largest empirical security analysis of the AI agent skill ecosystem, questioning this high classification of malicious skills. Therefore, we collect 238,180 unique skills from three major distribution platforms and GitHub to systematically analyze their type and behavior. This approach substantially reduces the number of skills flagged as non-benign by security scanners to only 0.52% which remain in malicious flagged repositories. Consequently, out methodology substantially reduces false positives and provides a more robust view of the ecosystem's current risk surface. Beyond that, we extend the security analysis from the mere investigation of the skill description to a comparison of its congruence with the GitHub repository the skill is embedded in, providing additional context. Furthermore, our analysis also uncovers several, by now undocumented real-world attack vectors, namely hijacking skills hosted on abandoned GitHub repositories.
title_zh: 恶意与否：将仓库上下文添加到代理技能分类中
abstract_zh: 代理技能扩展了本地AI代理（如Claude Code或Open Claw）的功能，其受欢迎程度催生了专门的技能市场平台，类似于移动应用的应用商店。与此同时，自动化技能扫描工具应运而生，通过分析SKILL.md文件中提供的技能描述，以验证其行为是否安全。在各个市场平台上，单个检测结果表明高达46.8%的技能被标记为恶意。本文提出了迄今为止对AI代理技能生态系统的最大规模实证安全分析，质疑这一高比例的恶意技能分类。为此，我们从三大分发平台及GitHub收集了238,180个唯一技能，系统地分析其类型与行为特征。该方法将被安全扫描器标记为非良性（non-benign）的技能数量大幅降低至仅0.52%，这些仍处于被标记为恶意的仓库中。因此，我们的方法显著减少了误报，并提供了对生态系统当前风险态势更为稳健的视角。此外，我们的安全分析不仅限于对技能描述的考察，还进一步比较了技能描述与其所嵌入的GitHub仓库内容的一致性，从而提供更丰富的上下文信息。同时，我们的分析还揭示了几种此前未被记录的真实世界攻击向量，例如劫持托管在已废弃GitHub仓库中的技能。

title: IQuest-Coder-V1 Technical Report
authors: Jian Yang, Wei Zhang, Shawn Guo, Zhengmao Ye, Lin Jing, Shark Liu, Yizhi Li, Jiajun Wu, Cening Liu, X. Ma, Yuyang Song, Siwei Wu, Yuwen Li, L. Liao, T. Zheng, Ziling Huang, Zelong Huang, Che Liu, Yan Xing, Renyuan Li, Qingsong Cai, Hanxu Yan, Siyue Wang, Shikai Li, Jason Klein Liu, An Huang, Yongsheng Kang, Jinxing Zhang, Chuan Hao, Haowen Wang, Weicheng Gu, Ran Tao, Mingjie Tang, Peihao Wu, Jianzhou Wang, Xianglong Liu, Weifeng Lv, Bryan Dai
abstract: In this report, we introduce the IQuest-Coder-V1 series-(7B/14B/40B/40B-Loop), a new family of code large language models (LLMs). Moving beyond static code representations, we propose the code-flow multi-stage training paradigm, which captures the dynamic evolution of software logic through different phases of the pipeline. Our models are developed through the evolutionary pipeline, starting with the initial pre-training consisting of code facts, repository, and completion data. Following that, we implement a specialized mid-training stage that integrates reasoning and agentic trajectories in 32k-context and repository-scale in 128k-context to forge deep logical foundations. The models are then finalized with post-training of specialized coding capabilities, which is bifurcated into two specialized paths: the thinking path (utilizing reasoning-driven RL) and the instruct path (optimized for general assistance). IQuest-Coder-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance among competitive models across critical dimensions of code intelligence: agentic software engineering, competitive programming, and complex tool use. To address deployment constraints, the IQuest-Coder-V1-Loop variant introduces a recurrent mechanism designed to optimize the trade-off between model capacity and deployment footprint, offering an architecturally enhanced path for efficacy-efficiency trade-off. We believe the release of the IQuest-Coder-V1 series, including the complete white-box chain of checkpoints from pre-training bases to the final thinking and instruction models, will advance research in autonomous code intelligence and real-world agentic systems.
title_zh: IQuest-Coder-V1 技术报告
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了 IQuest-Coder-V1 系列（7B/14B/40B/40B-Loop）——一种新型代码大语言模型（LLM）家族。与传统的静态代码表示不同，我们提出了“代码流多阶段训练范式”，通过流水线的不同阶段捕捉软件逻辑的动态演化过程。我们的模型通过一个演进式训练流程构建：首先进行初始预训练，涵盖代码事实、代码仓库和代码补全数据；随后引入专门的中期训练阶段，在32K上下文长度下融合推理与智能体轨迹，在128K上下文长度下实现仓库级规模的建模，以建立深层的逻辑基础；最后通过后训练阶段强化特定编码能力，该阶段分为两个专业化路径：思考路径（采用基于推理的强化学习）和指令路径（针对通用辅助任务进行优化）。IQuest-Coder-V1 在代码智能的关键维度上均达到当前领先水平，包括智能体式软件工程、竞赛编程以及复杂工具使用。为应对部署限制，IQuest-Coder-V1-Loop 变体引入了循环机制，旨在优化模型容量与部署开销之间的权衡，为效能与效率的平衡提供了一条架构增强路径。我们相信，IQuest-Coder-V1 系列的发布——包括从预训练基座到最终思考模型与指令模型的完整白盒检查点链——将推动自主代码智能与真实世界智能体系统的研究发展。

title: Self-Aware Markov Models for Discrete Reasoning
authors: Gregor Kornhardt, Jannis Chemseddine, Christian Wald, Gabriele Steidl
abstract: Standard masked discrete diffusion models face limitations in reasoning tasks due to their inability to correct their own mistakes on the masking path. Since they rely on a fixed number of denoising steps, they are unable to adjust their computation to the complexity of a given problem. To address these limitations, we introduce a method based on learning a Markov transition kernel that is trained on its own outputs. This design enables tokens to be remasked, allowing the model to correct its previous mistakes. Furthermore, we do not need a fixed time schedule but use a trained stopping criterion. This allows for adaptation of the number of function evaluations to the difficulty of the reasoning problem. Our adaptation adds two lightweight prediction heads, enabling reuse and fine-tuning of existing pretrained models. On the Sudoku-Extreme dataset we clearly outperform other flow based methods with a validity of 95%. For the Countdown-4 we only need in average of 10 steps to solve almost 96% of them correctly, while many problems can be solved already in 2 steps.
title_zh: 自感知马尔可夫模型在离散推理中的应用
abstract_zh: 标准的掩码离散扩散模型在推理任务中存在局限性，因为它们无法在掩码路径上纠正自身的错误。由于依赖于固定数量的去噪步骤，这些模型无法根据具体问题的复杂程度调整其计算过程。为解决这些问题，我们提出一种基于学习马尔可夫转移核的方法，该核通过自身输出进行训练。这一设计使得标记（tokens）可以被重新掩码，从而允许模型纠正先前的错误。此外，我们不再需要固定的时序调度，而是采用经过训练的停止准则。这使得函数评估次数能够根据推理问题的难度进行自适应调整。我们的方法仅增加两个轻量级预测头，即可实现对现有预训练模型的复用与微调。在Sudoku-Extreme数据集上，我们的方法显著优于其他基于流的方法，有效率高达95%。在Countdown-4任务中，平均仅需10步即可正确解决约96%的问题，且许多问题在2步内即可完成求解。

title: Efficient Reasoning on the Edge
authors: Yelysei Bondarenko, Thomas Hehn, Rob Hesselink, Romain Lepert, Fabio Valerio Massoli, Evgeny Mironov, Leyla Mirvakhabova, Tribhuvanesh Orekondy, Spyridon Stasis, Andrey Kuzmin, Anna Kuzina, Markus Nagel, Ankita Nayak, Corrado Rainone, Ork de Rooij, Paul N Whatmough, Arash Behboodi, Babak Ehteshami Bejnordi
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought reasoning achieve state-of-the-art performance across complex problem-solving tasks, but their verbose reasoning traces and large context requirements make them impractical for edge deployment. These challenges include high token generation costs, large KV-cache footprints, and inefficiencies when distilling reasoning capabilities into smaller models for mobile devices. Existing approaches often rely on distilling reasoning traces from larger models into smaller models, which are verbose and stylistically redundant, undesirable for on-device inference. In this work, we propose a lightweight approach to enable reasoning in small LLMs using LoRA adapters combined with supervised fine-tuning. We further introduce budget forcing via reinforcement learning on these adapters, significantly reducing response length with minimal accuracy loss. To address memory-bound decoding, we exploit parallel test-time scaling, improving accuracy at minor latency increase. Finally, we present a dynamic adapter-switching mechanism that activates reasoning only when needed and a KV-cache sharing strategy during prompt encoding, reducing time-to-first-token for on-device inference. Experiments on Qwen2.5-7B demonstrate that our method achieves efficient, accurate reasoning under strict resource constraints, making LLM reasoning practical for mobile scenarios. Videos demonstrating our solution running on mobile devices are available on our project page.
title_zh: 边缘端的高效推理
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）通过思维链推理在复杂问题求解任务中取得了最先进的性能，但其冗长的推理过程和庞大的上下文需求使其难以在边缘设备上部署。这些挑战包括高昂的 token 生成成本、巨大的 KV 缓存占用，以及在将推理能力蒸馏到小型模型以适配移动设备时的效率低下问题。现有方法通常依赖于从大模型中蒸馏出冗长且风格重复的推理轨迹，这并不适合设备端推理。在本工作中，我们提出一种轻量级方法，通过结合 LoRA 适配器与监督微调，使小型 LLM 能够实现有效推理。我们进一步引入基于强化学习的预算强制机制，对这些适配器进行优化，在几乎不损失准确率的前提下显著缩短响应长度。为应对内存受限的解码瓶颈，我们采用并行测试时扩展策略，在带来轻微延迟增加的同时提升了推理准确性。最后，我们设计了一种动态适配器切换机制，仅在需要时激活推理功能，并在提示编码阶段采用 KV 缓存共享策略，从而大幅降低设备端推理的首 token 延迟。在 Qwen2.5-7B 上的实验表明，我们的方法在严格资源约束下实现了高效且精准的推理，使 LLM 推理真正适用于移动场景。演示该方案在移动设备上运行的视频可于我们的项目页面查看。

title: Improving Code Comprehension through Cognitive-Load Aware Automated Refactoring for Novice Programmers
authors: Subarna Saha, Alif Al Hasan, Fariha Tanjim Shifat, Mia Mohammad Imran
abstract: Novice programmers often struggle to comprehend code due to vague naming, deep nesting, and poor structural organization. While explanations may offer partial support, they typically do not restructure the code itself. We propose code refactoring as cognitive scaffolding, where cognitively guided refactoring automatically restructures code to improve clarity. We operationalize this in CDDRefactorER, an automated approach grounded in Cognitive-Driven Development that constrains transformations to reduce control-flow complexity while preserving behavior and structural similarity. We evaluate CDDRefactorER using two benchmark datasets (MBPP and APPS) against two models (gpt-5-nano and kimi-k2), and a controlled human-subject study with novice programmers. Across datasets and models, CDDRefactorER reduces refactoring failures by 54-71% and substantially lowers the likelihood of increased Cyclomatic and Cognitive complexity during refactoring, compared to unconstrained prompting. Results from the human study show consistent improvements in novice code comprehension, with function identification increasing by 31.3% and structural readability by 22.0%. The findings suggest that cognitively guided refactoring offers a practical and effective mechanism for enhancing novice code comprehension.
title_zh: 通过认知负荷感知的自动化重构提升初学者程序员的代码理解能力
abstract_zh: 新手程序员常常因命名模糊、嵌套过深以及结构组织不良而难以理解代码。尽管解释性说明可提供部分帮助，但通常不会对代码本身进行重构。我们提出将代码重构作为认知支架（cognitive scaffolding），即通过认知引导的重构自动优化代码结构以提升可读性。我们在此基础上构建了CDDRefactorER——一种基于认知驱动开发（Cognitive-Driven Development）的自动化方法，其通过限制变换范围来降低控制流复杂度，同时保持程序行为不变和结构相似性。我们在两个基准数据集（MBPP和APPS）上，针对两种模型（gpt-5-nano和kimi-k2）评估了CDDRefactorER，并开展了一项受控的人类被试研究，对象为新手程序员。在不同数据集与模型下，CDDRefactorER使重构失败率降低了54%至71%，显著减少了重构过程中循环复杂度和认知复杂度升高的可能性，相较于无约束提示效果更优。人类实验结果表明，新手程序员对代码的理解能力得到持续提升，函数识别准确率提高31.3%，结构可读性提升22.0%。研究结果表明，认知引导的重构是一种切实有效、可落地的提升新手代码理解力的方法。

title: Chipmunq: Fault-Tolerant Compiler for Chiplet Quantum Architectures
authors: Peter Wegmann, Aleksandra Świerkowska, Emmanouil Giortamis, Pramod Bhatotia
abstract: As quantum computing advances toward fault-tolerance through quantum error correction, modular chiplet architectures have emerged to provide the massive qubit counts required while overcoming fabrication limits of monolithic chips. However, this transition introduces a critical compilation gap: existing frameworks cannot handle the scale of fault-tolerant quantum circuits while managing the noisy, sparse interconnects of chiplet backends. We present Chipmunq, the first hardware-aware compiler for mapping and routing fault-tolerant circuits onto modular architectures. Chipmunq employs a quantum-error-correction-aware partitioning strategy that preserves the integrity of logical qubit patches, preventing prohibitive gate overheads common in general-purpose compilers. Our evaluation demonstrates that Chipmunq achieves a 13.5x speedup in compilation time compared to state-of-the-art tools. By incorporating chiplet constraints and defective qubits, it reduces circuit depth by 86.4% and SWAP gate counts by 91.4% across varying code distances. Crucially, Chipmunq overcomes heterogeneous inter-chiplet links, improving logical error rates by up to two orders of magnitude.
title_zh: 芯粒量子架构的容错编译器
abstract_zh: 随着量子计算通过量子纠错向容错方向发展，模块化芯片小片（chiplet）架构应运而生，以在突破单片芯片制造极限的同时提供大规模的量子比特数量。然而，这一转变带来了关键的编译瓶颈：现有框架无法处理容错量子电路的规模，同时难以应对芯片小片后端中噪声大、稀疏的互连特性。我们提出了Chipmunq，这是首个面向模块化架构的、具备硬件感知能力的编译器，能够将容错量子电路映射并路由到该类架构上。Chipmunq采用一种考虑量子纠错的分区策略，有效保持逻辑量子比特区域的完整性，避免了通用编译器中常见的巨大门操作开销。评估结果表明，与当前最先进的工具相比，Chipmunq在编译时间上实现了13.5倍的加速。通过整合芯片小片约束和存在缺陷的量子比特，它在不同代码距离下将电路深度降低了86.4%，SWAP门数量减少了91.4%。尤为重要的是，Chipmunq成功克服了异构的芯片间连接问题，使逻辑错误率最高提升了两个数量级。

title: SoK: Systematizing Software Artifacts Traceability via Associations, Techniques, and Applications
authors: Zhifei Chen, Lata Yi, Liming Nie, Yangyang Zhao, Hao Liu, Yiqing Shi, Wei Song
abstract: Software development relies heavily on traceability links between various software artifacts to ensure quality and facilitate maintenance. While automated traceability recovery techniques have advanced for different artifact pairs, the field remains fragmented with an incomplete overview of artifact associations, ambiguous linking techniques, and fragmented knowledge of application scenarios. To bridge these gaps, we conducted a systematic literature review on software traceability recovery to synthesize the linked artifacts, recovery tools, and usage scenarios across the traceability ecosystem. First, we constructed the first global artifacts traceability graph of 23 associations among 22 artifact types, exposing a severe research imbalance that heavily favors code-related links. Second, while recovery techniques are shifting toward deep semantic models, a reproducibility crisis persists (e.g., only 37% of studies released code); to address this, we provided a comprehensive evaluation framework including a technical decision map and standardized benchmarks. Finally, we quantified an industrial adoption gap (i.e., 95% of tools remain confined to academia) and proposed a role-centric framework to dynamically align artifact paths with concrete engineering activities. This review contributes a coherent knowledge framework for artifacts traceability research, identifies current trends, and provides directions for future work.
title_zh: SoK：通过关联、技术与应用系统化软件制品可追溯性
abstract_zh: 软件开发高度依赖于各类软件制品之间的可追溯性链接，以确保质量并促进维护。尽管针对不同制品对的自动化可追溯性恢复技术已取得进展，但该领域仍呈现碎片化状态，存在制品关联关系不完整、链接技术模糊以及应用场景知识分散等问题。为弥合这些差距，我们开展了一项系统性文献综述，旨在整合可追溯性生态系统中相关制品、恢复工具及应用情境的知识。首先，我们构建了首个涵盖22种制品类型之间23种关联关系的全球性制品可追溯性图谱，揭示了研究严重失衡的现象——对代码相关链接的偏重尤为明显。其次，虽然恢复技术正逐步转向深度语义模型，但可复现性危机依然存在（例如，仅有37%的研究公开了代码）；为此，我们提出一个全面的评估框架，包含技术决策图和标准化基准。最后，我们量化了工业界采用差距（即95%的工具仍局限于学术领域），并提出一种以角色为中心的框架，以动态地将制品路径与具体的工程活动对齐。本综述为制品可追溯性研究提供了连贯的知识体系，识别了当前趋势，并为未来研究指明了方向。

title: RepoReviewer: A Local-First Multi-Agent Architecture for Repository-Level Code Review
authors: Peng Zhang
abstract: Repository-level code review requires reasoning over project structure, repository context, and file-level implementation details. Existing automated review workflows often collapse these tasks into a single pass, which can reduce relevance, increase duplication, and weaken prioritization. We present RepoReviewer, a local-first multi-agent system for automated GitHub repository review with a Python CLI, FastAPI API, LangGraph orchestration layer, and Next.js user interface. RepoReviewer decomposes review into repository acquisition, context synthesis, file-level analysis, finding prioritization, and summary generation. We describe the system design, implementation tradeoffs, developer-facing interfaces, and practical failure modes. Rather than claiming benchmark superiority, we frame RepoReviewer as a technical systems contribution: a pragmatic architecture for repository-level automated review, accompanied by reusable evaluation and reporting infrastructure for future empirical study.
title_zh: RepoReviewer：一种面向仓库级代码审查的本地优先多智能体架构
abstract_zh: 仓库级别的代码审查需要对项目结构、仓库上下文以及文件级别的实现细节进行综合推理。现有的自动化审查流程通常将这些任务合并为单一处理步骤，这可能导致相关性降低、重复增多，并削弱优先级判断。我们提出 RepoReviewer——一种以本地优先的多智能体系统，用于自动化 GitHub 仓库审查，包含 Python 命令行接口（CLI）、FastAPI API、LangGraph 协调层以及 Next.js 用户界面。RepoReviewer 将审查过程分解为：仓库获取、上下文整合、文件级分析、问题优先级排序和摘要生成五个阶段。本文详细描述了系统设计、实现权衡、面向开发者的接口以及实际运行中的失效模式。我们并未宣称其在基准测试中具有优越性能，而是将其定位为一项技术系统贡献：一个面向仓库级别自动化审查的务实架构，并配套提供可复用的评估与报告基础设施，以支持未来实证研究。

title: Internalizing Agency from Reflective Experience
authors: Rui Ge, Yichao Fu, Yuyang Qian, Junda Su, Yiming Zhao, Peng Zhao, Hao Zhang
abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that must plan, act, and recover from mistakes through long-horizon interaction with environments that provide rich feedback. However, prevailing outcome-driven post-training methods (e.g., RL with verifiable rewards) primarily optimize final success signals, leaving rich environment feedback underutilized. Consequently, they often lead to distribution sharpening: the policy becomes better at reproducing a narrow set of already-successful behaviors, while failing to improve the feedback-grounded agency needed to expand problem-solving capacity (e.g., Pass@k) in long-horizon settings. To address this, we propose LEAFE (Learning Feedback-Grounded Agency from Reflective Experience), a framework that internalizes recovery agency from reflective experience. Specifically, during exploration, the agent summarizes environment feedback into actionable experience, backtracks to earlier decision points, and explores alternative branches with revised actions. We then distill these experience-guided corrections into the model through supervised fine-tuning, enabling the policy to recover more effectively in future interactions. Across a diverse set of interactive coding and agentic tasks under fixed interaction budgets, LEAFE consistently improves Pass@1 over the base model and achieves higher Pass@k than outcome-driven baselines (GRPO) and experience-based methods such as Early Experience, with gains of up to 14% on Pass@128.
title_zh: 从反思经验中内化主体性
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型正越来越多地被部署为自主代理，需要在与提供丰富反馈的环境进行长时间交互的过程中完成规划、执行任务，并从错误中恢复。然而，当前主流的结果导向型后训练方法（如基于可验证奖励的强化学习）主要优化最终的成功信号，导致丰富的环境反馈未能得到充分利用。因此，这些方法往往引发分布锐化现象：策略变得越来越擅长重复少数已成功的行为模式，却无法提升基于反馈的自主能力，从而难以扩展长时程任务中的问题求解能力（例如 Pass@k 指标）。为解决这一问题，我们提出了 LEAFE（从反思性经验中学习反馈驱动的自主性），一种通过反思性经验内化恢复能力的框架。具体而言，在探索阶段，代理将环境反馈总结为可操作的经验，回溯到早期决策点，并以修正后的动作探索其他可能路径。随后，我们将这些由经验指导的修正过程提炼为监督微调数据，注入模型中，使策略在未来交互中具备更强的自我修复能力。在多种固定交互预算下的交互式编程和智能体任务中，LEAFE 均持续优于基础模型的 Pass@1 表现，并在 Pass@k 指标上超越结果驱动基线（GRPO）以及基于经验的方法（如 Early Experience），在 Pass@128 上最高实现 14% 的性能提升。

title: Agentic AI for SAGIN Resource Management_Semantic Awareness, Orchestration, and Optimization
authors: Linghao Zhang, Haitao Zhao, Bo Xu, Hongbo Zhu, Xianbin Wang
abstract: Space-air-ground integrated networks (SAGIN) promise ubiquitous 6G connectivity but face significant resource management challenges due to heterogeneous infrastructure, dynamic topologies, and stringent quality-of-service (QoS) requirements. Conventional model-driven approaches struggle with scalability and adaptability in such complex environments. This paper presents an agentic artificial intelligence (AI) framework for autonomous SAGIN resource management by embedding large language model (LLM)-based agents into a Monitor-Analyze-Plan- Execute-Knowledge (MAPE-K) control plane. The framework incorporates three specialized agents, namely semantic resource perceivers, intent-driven orchestrators, and adaptive learners, that collaborate through natural language reasoning to bridge the gap between operator intents and network execution. A key innovation is the hierarchical agent-reinforcement learning (RL) collaboration mechanism, wherein LLM-based orchestrators dynamically shape reward functions for RL agents based on semantic network conditions. Validation through UAV-assisted AIGC service orchestration in energy-constrained scenarios demonstrates that LLM-driven reward shaping achieves 14% energy reduction and the lowest average service latency among all compared methods. This agentic paradigm offers a scalable pathway toward adaptive, AI-native 6G networks, capable of autonomously interpreting intents and adapting to dynamic environments.
title_zh: 面向SAGIN资源管理的智能体AI：语义感知、编排与优化
abstract_zh: 空-天-地一体化网络（SAGIN）有望实现6G的无处不在的连接，但由于基础设施异构性、拓扑动态变化以及严格的服务质量（QoS）要求，其资源管理面临巨大挑战。传统的模型驱动方法在如此复杂的环境中难以实现可扩展性和适应性。本文提出一种基于智能体的人工智能（AI）框架，用于自主管理SAGIN资源，该框架将基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体嵌入到监控-分析-规划-执行-知识（MAPE-K）控制平面中。该框架包含三个专用智能体：语义资源感知器、意图驱动编排器和自适应学习者，它们通过自然语言推理协同工作，弥合运营商意图与网络执行之间的鸿沟。一个关键创新在于分层智能体-强化学习（RL）协作机制，其中基于LLM的编排器能够根据语义网络状态动态调整强化学习智能体的奖励函数。通过在能源受限场景下利用无人机辅助AIGC服务编排进行验证，结果表明，基于LLM的奖励函数设计可实现14%的能耗降低，并且在所有对比方法中达到最低的平均服务时延。这一智能体范式为构建可扩展、原生AI化的6G网络提供了可行路径，使其能够自主理解意图并适应动态环境。

title: Interpretable Context Methodology: Folder Structure as Agentic Architecture
authors: Jake Van Clief, David McDermott
abstract: Current approaches to AI agent orchestration typically involve building multi-agent frameworks that manage context passing, memory, error handling, and step coordination through code. These frameworks work well for complex, concurrent systems. But for sequential workflows where a human reviews output at each step, they introduce engineering overhead that the problem does not require. This paper presents Model Workspace Protocol (MWP), a method that replaces framework-level orchestration with filesystem structure. Numbered folders represent stages. Plain markdown files carry the prompts and context that tell a single AI agent what role to play at each step. Local scripts handle the mechanical work that does not need AI at all. The result is a system where one agent, reading the right files at the right moment, does the work that would otherwise require a multi-agent framework. This approach applies ideas from Unix pipeline design, modular decomposition, multi-pass compilation, and literate programming to the specific problem of structuring context for AI agents. The protocol is open source under the MIT license.
title_zh: 可解释的上下文方法论：文件夹结构作为代理架构
abstract_zh: 当前的AI代理编排方法通常涉及构建多代理框架，通过代码来管理上下文传递、记忆存储、错误处理以及步骤协调。这类框架在复杂且需要并发处理的系统中表现良好。然而，对于那些每一步都需要人类审查输出的顺序性工作流而言，这些框架引入了不必要的工程开销，超出了问题本身的需求。本文提出了一种名为“模型工作区协议”（Model Workspace Protocol, MWP）的方法，将框架层面的编排替换为基于文件系统的结构：用编号的文件夹表示各个阶段，使用普通的Markdown文件承载提示和上下文信息，明确指示单个AI代理在每个步骤中的角色。而所有机械性任务则由本地脚本完成，无需AI参与。最终形成一个系统：仅需一个AI代理，在恰当的时机读取正确的文件，即可完成原本需要多代理框架才能实现的任务。该方法借鉴了Unix管道设计、模块化分解、多遍编译以及文献编程的思想，专门用于组织AI代理所需的上下文信息。该协议采用MIT开源许可证，公开可用。

title: FPGA-Based 2-Phase Asynchronous Circuit Design for High Performance Computing
authors: Suman Kalyan Porel, Subhadeep Nag, Hemanta Kumar Mondal, Aniruddha Chandra
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: This work explores the design methodology and FPGA-based realization of asynchronous circuits composed of static data-flow handshake components governed by the two-phase bundled-data (BD) protocol. The methodology integrates tutorial-driven exposition with formal architectural analysis, emphasizing a rigorous approach to initialization strategies and the construction of coupled ring structures with arbitrary token distributions. Central to the design flow is the use of Mousetrap-style control templates, enabling localized, transition-driven handshake logic. The paper substantiates its methodology through a comprehensive power-performance-area evaluation, including gate-level synthesis of core handshaking primitives in a 32 nm CMOS technology node. Furthermore, it incorporates peephole-level optimizations, wherein composite components such as merged Join-register or MUX-register structures are synthesized for improved design efficiency. The practicality of the design flow is ultimately validated through the implementation of a Fibonacci sequence generator, showcasing correct functionality and handshake compliance across all components. All modules and the target circuits are verified through full-system deployment on Xilinx Basys 3 FPGA board, confirming robustness and functional correctness of the protocol under real hardware conditions. The average PPA metric of the Mousetrap controller has improved to 38%.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的两相异步电路设计在高性能计算中的应用
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了由静态数据流握手组件构成的异步电路的设计方法学及其基于FPGA的实现，这些组件遵循两相捆绑数据（BD）协议。该方法学将教学引导式阐述与形式化架构分析相结合，重点强调初始化策略的严谨性以及具有任意令牌分布的耦合环结构的构建。设计流程的核心在于采用类似“捕鼠器”（Mousetrap）风格的控制模板，从而实现局部化、基于状态转换的握手逻辑。论文通过全面的功耗-性能-面积（PPA）评估验证了该方法学的有效性，包括在32 nm CMOS工艺节点下对核心握手原语进行门级综合。此外，还引入了细粒度优化技术，对诸如合并的Join-寄存器或MUX-寄存器等复合组件进行综合，以提升设计效率。该设计流程的实际可行性通过一个斐波那契数列生成器的实现得到最终验证，展示了所有组件均具备正确的功能特性和握手协议合规性。所有模块及目标电路均在Xilinx Basys 3 FPGA开发板上完成全系统部署验证，确认了该协议在真实硬件环境下的鲁棒性与功能正确性。Mousetrap控制器的平均PPA指标已提升至38%。

title: Space-Native Hardware: A Vision for a New Architecture for On-Satellite LLM Inference
authors: Daliang Xu, Yixing Luo, Songwei Pei, Qing Li, Mengwei Xu, Shangguang Wang
abstract: Low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites are increasingly equipped with on-board computing, where large language model (LLM) inference has emerged as a representative workload for tasks. Yet, LLM inference is highly resource-intensive and faces unique LEO challenges, including irradiation effects, energy and battery constraints, and thermal throttling. Existing approaches fall short: edge accelerators lack space awareness, while space-grade hardware remains costly, limited in performance, and inefficient for LLM workloads. In this work, we provide a detailed analysis of these limitations and envision space-native hardware, an architecture-level design that combines the radiation resistance and reliability of space-grade systems with the cost efficiency and LLM capability of COTS hardware. Our vision further incorporates energy- and battery-aware intermittent execution, adaptive compute units responsive to power and thermal variations, and a space-native ISA with customized instructions for fault tolerance, checkpointing and recovery, and execution-mode control.
title_zh: 太空原生硬件：面向星载大模型推理的新架构展望
abstract_zh: 低地球轨道（LEO）卫星正越来越多地配备机载计算能力，其中大语言模型（LLM）推理已成为典型任务 workload。然而，LLM 推理对资源需求极高，并面临独特的 LEO 挑战，包括辐射效应、能源与电池容量限制以及热节流问题。现有方法存在明显不足：边缘加速器缺乏空间环境感知能力，而航天级硬件成本高昂，性能受限且对 LLM 工作负载效率低下。本文深入分析了这些局限性，并提出一种面向太空原生的硬件愿景——一种架构级设计，将航天级系统所具备的抗辐射性和可靠性与商用现成（COTS）硬件在成本效益和 LLM 处理能力方面的优势相结合。该愿景进一步融合了面向能量与电池状态的间歇式执行机制、能够根据电源和温度变化自适应调整的计算单元，以及专为容错、检查点与恢复、执行模式控制而定制的太空原生指令集架构（ISA）。
