title: Low-Power UART Architecture with Integrated SECDED for Reliable Asynchronous Communication
authors: Vatsal Rathod, Jay Patel, Gunjan Thakur, Abhishek Ray
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: This paper presents a compact, low-power UART architecture integrated with Single Error Correction and Double Error Detection (SECDED) for reliable serial communication in noisy and resource-constrained environments. The design incorporates an extended Hamming encoder—decoder within an FSM-controlled pipelined framework, enabling real-time error correction without violating standard UART timing conventions. Operating at only six times the baud rate, the proposed approach reduces hardware complexity and power consumption compared to traditional oversampling schemes. Implemented in Verilog and synthesized on 150 nm ASIC and FPGA platforms, the architecture achieves error-free data transfer while consuming just 0.099 W, with dynamic power limited to 2% through optimized clock gating. FPGA resource utilization remains below 1%. Extensive verification—including unit tests, errorinjection, and timing analysis—confirms protocol compliance and robust SECDED operation. With minimal area overhead and enhanced reliability, the proposed UART is well suited for IoT, smart home, and other safety-critical applications requiring energy-efficient and fault-tolerant serial links.
title_zh: 低功耗UART架构及其集成的SECDED用于可靠异步通信
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种紧凑、低功耗的UART架构，集成单错误纠正与双错误检测（SECDED）功能，可在噪声干扰严重且资源受限的环境中实现可靠的串行通信。该设计在有限状态机（FSM）控制的流水线框架内嵌入扩展汉明编码器-解码器，能够在不违反标准UART时序规范的前提下实现实时错误纠正。与传统的过采样方案相比，该方法仅需六倍波特率即可运行，显著降低了硬件复杂度和功耗。该架构采用Verilog语言实现，并在150 nm ASIC与FPGA平台上完成综合，实现了无错数据传输，功耗仅为0.099 W，通过优化的时钟门控技术将动态功耗控制在2%以内，FPGA资源利用率低于1%。经过全面验证——包括单元测试、错误注入测试及时序分析——结果表明该设计完全符合协议规范，具备稳健的SECDED运行能力。该UART设计具有极小的面积开销和更高的可靠性，适用于物联网、智能家居以及其他对能效和容错性要求较高的安全关键型应用。

title: Ku-band Low Noise Amplifier Configuration and Optimization through BiLSTM-based Deep Neural Networks
authors: Lida Kouhalvandi, Ladislau Matekovits
abstract: This work proposes an automated configuration and sizing framework for a low-noise amplifier (LNA) operating in the Ku-band. The methodology is based on the implementation of deep neural networks (DNNs), specifically a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) classifier and a BiLSTM regression model, which are employed sequentially to first generate an appropriate LNA topology and subsequently predict the optimal design parameters of the selected configuration. To further refine the design toward multiple conflicting objectives, a multi-objective multiverse optimization (MOMVO) algorithm is integrated into the workflow to balance key performance metrics such as noise figure, and gain. The overall process is fully automated through the coordinated use of an electronic design automation (EDA) tool and a numerical analysis environment, wherein the circuit topology is synthesized and simulated in the EDA platform, while parameter optimization and decision-making are carried out in the numerical analyzer. This closed-loop framework enables rapid convergence to high-performance solutions with minimal human intervention. The practical effectiveness of the proposed methodology is validated by designing and optimizing an LNA suitable for a Ku-band small satellite receiver, achieving a noise figure below 1.5 dB while satisfying gain and stability constraints, thereby demonstrating the viability of deep learning–assisted automated radio frequency circuit design.
title_zh: 基于双向长短期记忆网络的K波段低噪声放大器配置与优化
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于工作在Ku波段的低噪声放大器（LNA）的自动化配置与尺寸设计框架。该方法基于深度神经网络（DNN）的实现，具体包括一个双向长短期记忆（BiLSTM）分类器和一个BiLSTM回归模型，二者按顺序使用：首先生成合适的LNA拓扑结构，随后预测所选配置的最优设计参数。为进一步优化设计以应对多个相互冲突的目标，该流程中集成了多目标多宇宙优化（MOMVO）算法，用以平衡关键性能指标，如噪声系数和增益。整个过程通过电子设计自动化（EDA）工具与数值分析环境的协同使用实现完全自动化：电路拓扑在EDA平台中进行综合与仿真，而参数优化与决策则在数值分析环境中完成。这一闭环框架能够以极小的人工干预快速收敛至高性能设计方案。通过设计并优化适用于Ku波段小型卫星接收机的LNA，验证了该方法的实际有效性，实现了噪声系数低于1.5 dB的同时满足增益与稳定性约束，充分展示了深度学习辅助的自动化射频电路设计的可行性与优越性。

title: Code Invaders: Detecting Malicious Activity in Embedded Systems
authors: Aryan Panwar, Deeksha Dhaka, Avichal Tomar, Ayush Tyagi, Akash Rajak
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Advanced Computing and Emerging Technologies (ACET)
abstract: As of today more embedded and IoT (Internet of Things) devices are being used in the world today and deployed for in the world's most critical applications, therefore the need for lightweight, affordable, and highly effective ransomware training and detection tools adapted for specialized resource-scarce environments for employees to work safely from their devices is highly critical. To address these needs, this research proposes the first cross-architecture integrated hardware and software solution of its kind designed to use Hardware Performance Counters (HPCs) in tracking low-level processor events such as cache hits, cache misses and branches, and using those to help to detect the continuing use of ransomware. Different from the highly accurate tracking signature-based methods in the computers of today, this is a tracking signature-free, operational real-time method. this makes it highly abnormal, unrecognized and unknown from the unrecognizable ransomware common. It uses the extraction of real-time data characteristics from the HPC and machinelearning tracking signature Barns and counterparts to identify benign processes and aligned ransomware to malicious behavior. The use of the affordable general-purpose embedded computer, Raspberry Pi, showed that the operational support of the tracking signature method was kept within the acceptable limits of the computer.
title_zh: 代码入侵：检测嵌入式系统中的恶意活动
abstract_zh: 截至目前，全球范围内使用的嵌入式设备和物联网（IoT）设备数量持续增长，并被广泛部署于世界最关键的应用场景中。因此，迫切需要轻量级、低成本且高效可靠的勒索软件训练与检测工具，以适应资源受限的特殊环境，确保员工能够安全地从其设备上工作。为应对这一需求，本研究首次提出了一种跨架构的软硬件一体化解决方案，该方案利用硬件性能计数器（HPCs）来追踪处理器的底层事件，如缓存命中、缓存未命中和分支操作，并基于这些数据实现对勒索软件持续使用的检测。与当前计算机中高精度的基于签名的追踪方法不同，本方法采用无签名、实时运行的追踪机制，能够有效识别那些异常、未知且难以察觉的新型勒索软件。该方法通过从HPC中提取实时数据特征，并结合机器学习技术构建追踪签名（如Barns及其对应模型），以区分良性进程与恶意行为中的勒索软件活动。实验表明，使用成本低廉的通用嵌入式计算平台——树莓派（Raspberry Pi），该追踪方法在实际运行中仍能保持在可接受的性能范围内，具备良好的可行性与实用性。

title: LIMR: Intent-Aware Mashup API Recommendation via LLM-Augmented Multi-Scale Fusion
authors: Yao Zhang, Yude Bai, Minhong Dong, Keqing Cen, Ji Zhang, Qiang Hu, Wei Ma, Yongqiang Lyu, Ruitao Feng, Xiaohong Li, Junjie Wang, Lingxiao Jiang, Yang Liu
abstract: The increasing availability of Web APIs has amplified the complexity of mashup creation, where developers must identify compatible and functionally relevant APIs based on often ambiguous natural language descriptions. Traditional methods also fall short in capturing hierarchical semantic cues, modeling compatibility, and aligning with developer intent. Although large language models (LLMs) offer strong generalization capabilities, they remain unreliable in mashup recommendation due to hallucinated outputs, limited controllability, and token-length constraints when dealing with large-scale API repositories. To overcome these limitations, we introduce LIMR, an intent-aware mashup recommendation framework that combines LLM-augmented semantic reasoning with structured, multi-scale neural modeling. LIMR first prompts a LLM to extract high-level intent from user requirements, which serves as a global semantic signal. This intent is fused with low-level, multi-scale features extracted by a convolutional encoder, which are designed to capture fine-grained lexical/phrasal patterns at different granularities and provide precise semantic grounding for API matching. These heterogeneous representations are further contextually refined through a Transformer-based interaction module. To handle nonlinear semantic dependencies and compositional complexity, LIMR integrates a Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) with learnable activation functions, enhancing the model's capacity to capture intricate feature interactions. The entire framework is optimized via LLM, incorporating auxiliary objectives such as mashup category prediction and API quality estimation to guide generalization and reduce overfitting. Comprehensive experiments on the ProgrammableWeb and APIBench datasets show that LIMR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, which the ranking-oriented metrics, including NDCG and mAP, achieves improvements of 17.1%–34.2% over the strongest competitors. These results confirm the effectiveness of LIMR's hybrid design in delivering precise, robust, and intent-aware mashup API recommendations, especially in scenarios where LLMs alone fail to meet accuracy and scalability demands.
title_zh: LIMR：基于大语言模型增强的多尺度融合意图感知混搭API推荐
abstract_zh:
Web API 的日益普及显著增加了 mashup 创建的复杂性，开发者需要基于常常模糊不清的自然语言描述，从海量 API 中识别出兼容且功能相关的接口。传统方法在捕捉层次化语义线索、建模兼容性以及对齐开发者意图方面仍存在不足。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）具备强大的泛化能力，但在 mashup 推荐任务中仍表现不可靠，主要受限于幻觉输出、可控性差以及处理大规模 API 仓库时的 token 长度限制。为克服这些局限，我们提出 LIMR——一种面向意图感知的 mashup 推荐框架，该框架将 LLM 增强的语义推理与结构化的多尺度神经建模相结合。

LIMR 首先通过提示一个 LLM 来提取用户需求中的高层意图，作为全局语义信号。该意图与由卷积编码器提取的低层、多尺度特征进行融合，这些特征旨在捕捉不同粒度下的细粒度词汇/短语模式，并为 API 匹配提供精确的语义基础。这些异构表示进一步通过基于 Transformer 的交互模块进行上下文化精炼。为了应对非线性语义依赖关系和组合复杂性，LIMR 引入了具有可学习激活函数的柯尔莫戈洛夫-阿诺德网络（Kolmogorov-Arnold Network, KAN），从而增强模型捕捉复杂特征交互的能力。

整个框架通过 LLM 进行优化，引入了诸如 mashup 类别预测和 API 质量评估等辅助目标，以引导模型泛化并减少过拟合。在 ProgrammableWeb 和 APIBench 数据集上的全面实验表明，LIMR 显著优于现有最先进基线方法，在以排名为导向的评价指标（如 NDCG 和 mAP）上，相较最强竞争者实现了 17.1% 至 34.2% 的性能提升。结果充分验证了 LIMR 混合设计的有效性，能够提供精准、鲁棒且意图感知的 mashup API 推荐，尤其在仅依赖 LLM 无法满足准确性与可扩展性要求的场景下表现出色。

title: FPGA Optimized Pipelined Modulo Computation Architecture Leveraging Primitive Instantiation and Placement Constraints for Efficient Logic Packing
authors: Suprabhat Bhattacharjee, Ayan Palchaudhuri
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: Modulo arithmetic constitute an essential component of many cryptographic algorithms. In this paper, we have proposed a fast and compact architecture for <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$X \bmod Z$</tex> computation tailored for FPGAs. One of the primary challenges in an FPGA based design is improving upon the logic packing density which has been carefully taken care of by appropriate configuration of logic elements. Primitive instantiation technique is adopted to effectively utilize the internal FPGA slice architecture by optimal configuration of look-up tables and use of fast carry chain. Pipelining is introduced to reduce critical path delay and placement constraints are applied to maximize logic resource usage within a configured FPGA slice, thereby improving area efficiency. The designs are crafted to ensure a good fit into modern day FPGA families, thereby throwing light on generic datapath design techniques to extract high performance.
title_zh: 利用原语实例化与布局约束实现高效逻辑打包的FPGA优化流水线模运算计算架构
abstract_zh: 模运算构成了许多密码算法中的重要组成部分。本文提出了一种针对FPGA的快速且紧凑的X mod Z计算架构。基于FPGA的设计中一个主要挑战是提升逻辑资源的密度，本文通过合理配置逻辑单元，有效解决了这一问题。采用原语实例化技术，通过对查找表的最优配置以及利用快速进位链，充分挖掘FPGA内部切片结构的潜力。引入流水线设计以降低关键路径延迟，并应用布局约束以最大化在已配置FPGA切片内的逻辑资源利用率，从而提高面积效率。所设计的架构能够良好适配现代FPGA系列，为通用数据通路设计技术提供了借鉴，有助于实现高性能目标。

title: BHARAT-TPM: Micro-Architecture Design of Scalable Hardware Random Number Generator for a RISC-V Trusted Platform Module
authors: Soumya G Hosmani, Raja Sekar K, Aneesh Raveendran, Vivian Desalphine, Hari Babu P, S D Sudarsan
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: Trusted Platform Modules (TPMs) are widely used in modern digital systems to provide a Root-of-Trust and support for various security applications. Random number generation plays a crucial role in secure applications such as message authentication, digital signatures, pseudo-random number generation, and cryptographic key derivation. Dedicated hardware accelerators for random number generation enhances the performance of cryptographic operations in TPMs. With the rise of RISC-V open-source architectures, integrating cryptographic accelerators into TPMs is vital for secure embedded designs. In this context, this paper presents a high-performance, AXI enabled Random Number Generator (RNG) hardware accelerator is integrated into an indigenous RISC-V based, named BHARAT-TPM. The RNG micro-architecture has been validated for compliance with NIST SP800-90B and supports three output widths (128, 256, and 512 bits). The accelerator interfaces with the system through AXI-4 compliant control and data registers, ensuring seamless integration within RISC-V-based TPMs. The RNG accelerator is implemented in Verilog RTL and verified with NIST test vectors. The proposed accelerator is integrated with the BHARAT-TPM is prototyped on Xilinx Virtex UltraScale VCU118 FPGA devices and validated for TCG 2.0 commands. The proposed RNG accelerator achieves a frequency of 370 Mhz, demonstrating and suitability for high-speed cryptographic operations in TPM based security applications.
title_zh: BHARAT-TPM：面向RISC-V可信平台模块的可扩展硬件随机数生成器的微架构设计
abstract_zh: 可信平台模块（TPMs）在现代数字系统中被广泛使用，以提供信任根并支持各种安全应用。随机数生成在消息认证、数字签名、伪随机数生成以及密码密钥派生等安全应用中起着至关重要的作用。专门用于随机数生成的硬件加速器能够显著提升TPM中密码运算的性能。随着RISC-V开源架构的兴起，将密码加速器集成到TPM中对于实现安全的嵌入式设计至关重要。在此背景下，本文提出了一种高性能、支持AXI接口的随机数生成器（RNG）硬件加速器，并成功集成至国产基于RISC-V架构的BHARAT-TPM中。该RNG微架构已通过NIST SP800-90B标准的合规性验证，支持128位、256位和512位三种输出宽度。该加速器通过符合AXI-4规范的控制与数据寄存器与系统通信，确保其在基于RISC-V的TPM中实现无缝集成。RNG加速器采用Verilog RTL实现，并通过NIST测试向量进行了验证。所提出的加速器已集成至BHARAT-TPM，并在Xilinx Virtex UltraScale VCU118 FPGA平台上完成原型设计，且通过了TCG 2.0命令的验证。该RNG加速器最高工作频率达370 MHz，充分证明其适用于基于TPM的安全应用中的高速密码运算。

title: Bridging the Gaps in Distributed Deadlock Detection
authors: Surendra Kumar Shukla, Vishan Kumar Gupta, Paras Jain, Tarandeep Kaur Bhatia, Devanshi Ramani, Riju Patidar
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Advanced Computing and Emerging Technologies (ACET)
abstract: The need for performance in today's computer systems has led to the use of automatic. The problem of identifying and handling deadlocks in distributed systems is rather unsolved, given the fact that many processes operate concurrently during their run time, accessing resources of other nodes. Although several algorithms have been developed over the years, a critical issue remains: the latter most do not have strict formal validation, which means that errors and low performance are probable. Based on the literature, this paper provides an overview of the existing techniques for deadlock detection and identifies the research lacuna. Some of these gaps are: The lack of formal correctness proofs, Performance analysis that is mostly done with message counts and Forgetfulness of real-world characteristics. Furthermore, the present literature lacks enough research regarding deadlock detection or at least the solutions to the problem. This work therefore reviews related work in several areas and discusses the lack of viable techniques for testing real systems in the following areas of distributed databases, multithreaded applications, and object systems. In this paper, we utilize temporal logic to construct a formal verification approach for proving the precision of deadlock identification procedures. In addition, we consider ASTs as a value-added solution in identifying deadlock issues in multithreaded program development, based on source code analysis. This review intends to guide future research to support the creation of stronger and flexible deadlock detection and prevention solutions that must address existing modern distributed systems.
title_zh: 分布式死锁检测中的差距弥补
abstract_zh: 当今计算机系统对性能的高要求促使了自动化技术的广泛应用。然而，分布式系统中死锁的识别与处理问题至今仍未得到妥善解决，原因在于运行时多个进程往往并发执行，并访问其他节点的资源。尽管多年来已开发出多种算法，但一个关键问题依然存在：大多数现有算法缺乏严格的正式验证，这意味着错误和低性能的可能性极高。基于文献综述，本文概述了现有的死锁检测技术，并指出了当前研究中的空白。其中一些主要缺陷包括：缺乏形式化正确性证明、性能分析大多仅依赖消息计数，以及忽视真实世界系统的实际特征。此外，现有文献在死锁检测或至少相关解决方案方面的研究仍显不足。因此，本文回顾了多个领域的相关工作，并讨论了在分布式数据库、多线程应用和对象系统等领域中，缺乏可行的、用于测试真实系统的有效技术。本文采用时序逻辑构建一种形式化验证方法，以证明死锁识别过程的精确性。同时，我们还提出将抽象语法树（AST）作为一项增值手段，通过源代码分析来识别多线程程序开发中的死锁问题。本综述旨在为未来研究提供指导，推动更强大、更灵活的死锁检测与预防方案的发展，以应对现代分布式系统所面临的挑战。

title: Multi-Context Protocol (MCP) Hosts provide secure and real-time integration of AI tools
authors: VasanthRao Jadav
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Real-time intelligent workflows require AI agents to securely interact with external tools, REST APIs, and data sources—capabilities that static, model-only systems cannot provide. This paper presents a secure and modular framework built on the Multi-Context Protocol (MCP), enabling AI agents to execute external tools through permission-gated and auditable workflows. The architecture integrates MCP Clients, Servers, and Hosts, coordinated via an API Gateway enforcing TLS 1.2, OAuth 2.0, and enterprise authentication.An MCP Inspector validates tool behavior prior to deployment, while the MCP Host interprets user intent, selects the appropriate tool, and combines tool outputs with embedded LLM-generated reasoning. The system supports internal scripts, enterprise services, and third-party APIs, with all executions requiring explicit user approval.Demonstrations using a real-time Weather Tool and File Explorer Tool highlight dynamic tool discovery, secure execution, and LLM-assisted response generation. Results show that MCP enables scalable, secure, and compliant AI-agent workflows, outperforming conventional agent frameworks by preventing unauthorized actions and minimizing data leakage through built-in guardrails.
title_zh: 多上下文协议（MCP）主机可实现AI工具的安全且实时集成。
abstract_zh: 实时智能工作流要求AI代理能够安全地与外部工具、REST API及数据源交互，而静态的仅依赖模型的系统无法实现这一能力。本文提出了一种基于多上下文协议（MCP）的安全且模块化框架，使AI代理可通过权限控制和可审计的工作流执行外部工具操作。该架构集成了MCP客户端、服务器和主机，通过API网关进行协调，强制实施TLS 1.2、OAuth 2.0及企业级身份认证。MCP检查器在部署前验证工具行为，而MCP主机则解析用户意图，选择合适的工具，并将工具输出与嵌入式大语言模型生成的推理结果相结合。系统支持内部脚本、企业服务以及第三方API，所有执行均需用户明确授权。通过实时天气工具和文件浏览器工具的演示，展示了动态工具发现、安全执行及LLM辅助响应生成的能力。实验结果表明，MCP实现了可扩展、安全且合规的AI代理工作流，在防止未经授权操作和通过内置防护机制最大限度减少数据泄露方面，显著优于传统代理框架。

title: Security-aware Performance-Optimized Computation Offloading Under Near Memory Processing
authors: Simran Preet Kaur, Asutosh Kumar Sarma, Satanu Maity, Manojit Ghose
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: With the emergence of resource-intensive applications and the rising popularity of cloud computing, resource sharing has become a common practice, primarily to improve system performance. However, the sharing of resources introduces various threats, including cache side-channel attacks. This paper presents a strategy called SecNMP, which utilizes an emerging computing paradigm known as near memory processing (NMP), and performs a fine-grained security-aware computation offloading to mitigate these cache side-channel attacks by restricting the use of shared cache memory. The framework begins with a static program analysis to automatically identify the sensitive regions of an application. Next, the framework effectively executes non-sensitive regions of the application on the multicore processor, while sensitive regions are offloaded to the NMP cores for execution. Experiments conducted using a set of standard simulators show that our approach achieves a 36 % speedup compared to the state-of-the-art policy. Additionally, SecNMP offloads 18 % fewer instructions than the state-of-the-art approach and reduces energy consumption by 6 %. Furthermore, the proposed strategy outperforms the conventional approach, reducing off-chip data transfer by 53 %.
title_zh: 近内存计算下的安全感知性能优化计算卸载
abstract_zh: 随着资源密集型应用的兴起以及云计算的日益普及，资源共享已成为一种常见做法，主要目的是提升系统性能。然而，资源共享也带来了多种安全威胁，其中包括缓存侧信道攻击。本文提出了一种名为SecNMP的策略，该策略利用一种新兴的计算范式——近内存处理（Near Memory Processing, NMP），通过细粒度的安全感知计算卸载来缓解这些缓存侧信道攻击，其核心是限制共享缓存内存的使用。该框架首先通过静态程序分析自动识别应用程序中的敏感区域；随后，框架在多核处理器上高效执行非敏感区域，而将敏感区域卸载至NMP核心进行执行。通过一系列标准模拟器进行的实验表明，与当前最先进的策略相比，本方法实现了36%的加速比。此外，SecNMP比现有先进方法少卸载18%的指令，并降低了6%的能耗。同时，该策略相较于传统方法，减少了53%的片外数据传输。

title: Agents4PLC: Automating Closed-loop PLC Code Generation and Verification in Industrial Control Systems using LLM-based Agents_supp1-3667895.pdf
authors: Dongxia Wang
abstract: In industrial control systems, the generation and verification of Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) code are crucial for ensuring operational efficiency and safety. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have made strides in automated code generation, they fall short in providing correctness guarantees and specialized support for PLC programming (which has its own programming language and clear logical structures). To address these challenges, this paper introduces Agents4PLC, a novel framework that not only automates PLC code generation but also introduces code-level verification and repair built upon an LLM-based multi-agent system, which together is capable of directly producing operational PLC code without any human interaction. To comprehensively evaluate our framework, we first establish a new benchmark specially designed for the critical area of verifiable PLC code generation, which includes hundreds of natural language requirements, human-written and verified formal specifications, and finally reference PLC code. Then, we carefully designed a multi-agent workflow combining a set of expert agents responsible for different code generation tasks including planning, coding, validation and debugging towards generating correct PLC code. For each agent, we also incorporate optimization strategies such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), advanced prompt engineering techniques, and Chain-of-Thought strategies which are shown to be effective to enhance the ability of these expert ‘agents’. Evaluation against the benchmark demonstrates that Agents4PLC significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving superior results across a series of increasingly rigorous evaluation metrics. This research highlights the potential of LLM agent-based code generation in real-world industrial control systems and the importance of code-level verification in generating correct code with formal guarantees.
title_zh: Agents4PLC：基于大语言模型代理的工业控制系统闭环PLC代码生成与验证_supp1-3667895.pdf
abstract_zh:
在工业控制系统中，可编程逻辑控制器（PLC）代码的生成与验证对于确保系统运行效率和安全性至关重要。尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化代码生成方面已取得显著进展，但在提供代码正确性保障以及针对PLC编程（具有专用编程语言和明确逻辑结构）的专业化支持方面仍存在明显不足。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种名为Agents4PLC的新框架，该框架不仅能够自动化生成PLC代码，还基于LLM驱动的多智能体系统，引入了代码级别的验证与修复机制，从而实现无需任何人工干预即可直接生成可运行的PLC代码。

为了全面评估本框架，我们首先构建了一个专为“可验证PLC代码生成”这一关键领域设计的新基准，该基准包含数百条自然语言需求、人工编写并经过验证的形式化规范，以及对应的参考PLC代码。随后，我们精心设计了一套多智能体工作流，整合了一系列负责不同代码生成任务的专家智能体，包括规划、编码、验证与调试，以协同生成正确的PLC代码。针对每个智能体，我们还引入了多种优化策略，如检索增强生成（RAG）、先进的提示工程技术和思维链（Chain-of-Thought）策略，这些方法被证明能有效提升各专家“智能体”的能力表现。

在该基准上的评估结果表明，Agents4PLC显著优于现有方法，在一系列逐步严格的评估指标上均取得了更优的表现。本研究凸显了基于LLM智能体的代码生成技术在真实工业控制系统中的巨大潜力，同时也强调了在生成具备形式化保证的正确代码过程中，代码级验证的重要性。

title: Metrics Gathering for AI-based Trust Assessment
authors: Lorenzo Ferro, Flavio Ciravegna, Francesco Zaritto, Antonio Lioy, Luis Landeiro Ribeiro
publish: 2025 International Conference on Intelligent Computing, Communication, Networking and Services (ICCNS)
abstract: Technological advances have increased the complex-ity and volume of system operations. As a result, today systems face broader attack surfaces due to the larger amount of code executed. Ensuring the reliability of applications and operations in such environments requires well-defined security criteria, but establishing them is a non-trivial task. Trusted Computing offers mechanisms to establish trust in a non-repudiable manner, yet it faces inefficiencies and scalability challenges when applied to complex scenarios. In fact, defining a flexible verification method for a complex system is a challenging task. This is especially true when the process focuses solely on verifying individual actions rather than on the overall system's behaviour. AI-based techniques offer a viable countermeasure, since modelling a sys-tem's behaviour provides an adaptable approach to determining reliability. An AI model can also analyse a larger amount of data. However, collecting, securely storing, and provisioning relevant information is still a required feature. This work proposes two approaches for the secure collection of system events. The objective is to facilitate the provision of an AI model while ensuring the integrity and authenticity of the data.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的可信度评估指标收集
abstract_zh: 技术进步使得系统操作的复杂性和数据量显著增加。因此，由于执行的代码量更大，当今系统面临更广泛的攻击面。在这样的环境中，确保应用程序和操作的可靠性需要明确的安全标准，但制定这些标准并非易事。可信计算提供了一种不可否认的方式建立信任，但在复杂场景中应用时仍存在效率低下和可扩展性挑战的问题。事实上，为复杂系统定义一种灵活的验证方法是一项极具挑战性的任务，尤其当验证过程仅关注单个操作而忽视整个系统的整体行为时更是如此。基于人工智能的技术提供了一种可行的应对方案，因为对系统行为进行建模可以为判断可靠性提供一种适应性强的方法，同时AI模型还能分析更大规模的数据。然而，收集、安全存储和提供相关信息仍然是必不可少的功能。本文提出了两种用于安全收集系统事件的方法，旨在促进AI模型的部署，同时确保数据的完整性和真实性。

title: Research on Performance Evaluation Indicators and Benchmark for Artificial Intelligence Chip
authors: Yue Zhao, Jun Luo, Qiuzhen Zhang, Zhizhe Wang
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, and Information Processing (AICSIP)
abstract: With the explosive development of artificial intelligence (AI) technology, as the fundamental support for computing power, AI chips are facing an ever - more - pressing requirement for standardized performance evaluation. The benchmark suite for AI chip testing is not merely a tool for performance evaluation; rather, it serves as a central driving force in technological iteration and the establishment of an industrial ecosystem. Beginning with the performance metrics of AI chips and the characteristics of benchmark test suites, this paper analyzes and synthesizes existing AI chip evaluation tools and benchmark test suites. We delve into the AI computing capabilities of chips to conduct a comprehensive assessment of current test benchmark suites. Consequently, the research presented herein provides crucial support for the fullspectrum optimization of AI chips, spanning from laboratory development to industrial deployment.
title_zh: 人工智能芯片性能评估指标与基准研究
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）技术的爆炸式发展，作为计算能力基础支撑的AI芯片，正面临日益迫切的标准化性能评估需求。AI芯片测试的基准套件不仅是一种性能评估工具，更是推动技术迭代和构建产业生态体系的核心驱动力。本文从AI芯片的性能指标及基准测试套件的特点出发，系统分析与综合现有AI芯片评估工具与基准测试套件，深入探讨芯片的AI计算能力，对当前测试基准套件进行全面评估。因此，本研究为AI芯片从实验室研发到工业部署的全链条优化提供了重要支撑。

title: RISC-V Unified: A Cross-Platform Generation Framework from Architecture to Implementation
authors: Mohamed Badawy, Jiulong Wang, Paritosh Kumar Sinha, Wolfgang Ecker
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Register-Transfer Level (RTL) generation is foundational to hardware design, converting high-level specifications into synthesizable descriptions for physical implementation. Conventional RTL generators produce platform-agnostic designs to enable flexibility across diverse targets (e.g., FPGA or ASIC), however this approach is problematic for designs with technology-specific components (e.g., memory macros), where generic constructs—suitable for simulation and verification—fail to leverage native hardware resources, leading to either non-implementable designs or inefficient synthesis and degraded power, performance, and area (PPA) metrics. Extensive manual adaptations are thus required, eroding automation benefits and widening the design productivity gap. This paper proposes a cross-platform methodology that automates the generation of RTL code and constraints tailored to both ASIC and FPGA platforms, enabling optimal native resource utilization. Applied to a RISC-V subsystem, it enables seamless synthesis and implementation across targets, forming an end-to-end workflow from specification to deployment. Evaluations on an AMD Zynq UltraScale+ FPGA and a 22 nm ASIC process demonstrate substantial improvements: up to 3.66× higher maximum frequency, 3.44× area reduction, 5.99× power savings, and 18.80× faster implementation run times compared to platform-agnostic baselines, affirming its robustness for modern embedded systems.
title_zh: RISC-V统一：从架构到实现的跨平台生成框架
abstract_zh:
寄存器传输级（RTL）生成是硬件设计的基础，它将高层次的设计规范转换为可综合的描述，以实现物理层面的部署。传统的RTL生成工具通常生成与平台无关的设计，以支持在不同目标平台（如FPGA或ASIC）间的灵活性。然而，对于包含特定技术组件（如存储宏单元）的设计而言，这种通用化的方法存在明显缺陷：虽然这些通用结构适用于仿真和验证，却无法有效利用原生硬件资源，导致设计要么无法实现，要么在综合后产生低效结果，进而恶化功耗、性能和面积（PPA）指标。因此，必须进行大量手动调整，这不仅削弱了自动化带来的优势，还进一步拉大了设计效率的差距。

本文提出了一种跨平台的方法，能够自动为ASIC和FPGA平台生成定制化的RTL代码及约束条件，从而实现对原生硬件资源的最优利用。该方法应用于一个RISC-V子系统时，实现了在不同目标平台间无缝的综合与实现，构建了从规格说明到部署的端到端工作流。在AMD Zynq UltraScale+ FPGA和22 nm ASIC工艺上的评估表明，相比传统平台无关基线方案，本方法实现了显著提升：最高频率提高达3.66倍，面积减少3.44倍，功耗降低5.99倍，实现时间加快18.80倍。这些成果充分证明了该方法在现代嵌入式系统中的强大适用性与有效性。

title: Transforming Code Development with Large Language Models
authors: Alex Kaplunovich
publish: 2025 International Conference on Intelligent Computing, Communication, Networking and Services (ICCNS)
abstract: In recent years, a plethora of code generation tools, products, and models have been released, varying in price, size, integration capabilities, and the resources required for their utilization. In our study, we explored a range of tools, from IDE-integrated “helpers” to open-source models, to identify their advantages, drawbacks, successes, and failures. Our research aims to assist developers and data scientists in navigating the evolving landscape of code assistants and preparing for potential challenges. We have explored several key methods and techniques, including LLM finetuning, code dataset selection, the use of quantized models to minimize GPU memory requirements, and the implementation of techniques like LoRA, QLoRA, and PEFT for efficient tuning. Additionally, we explored llama.cpp for running advanced models on moderate CPU instances. Our research compared existing AI coding methods, commercial models and open-source LLMs, evaluating their performance, benefits, and limitations. We have also identified the missing tools and possible future trends. Our findings are intended to guide the software community through the rapidly advancing realm of Generative AI for coding, helping people to select solutions that best fit their specific needs, budget, and technological experience.
title_zh: 利用大型语言模型变革代码开发
abstract_zh: 近年来，各类代码生成工具、产品和模型层出不穷，其价格、规模、集成能力以及使用所需资源各不相同。在本研究中，我们考察了从集成于IDE的“助手”到开源模型等一系列工具，旨在识别它们的优势、缺陷、成功之处与失败原因。我们的研究目标是帮助开发者和数据科学家应对不断演变的代码助手生态，并为潜在挑战做好准备。我们深入探讨了几项关键技术与方法，包括大语言模型（LLM）微调、代码数据集的选择、采用量化模型以降低GPU内存需求，以及实施LoRA、QLoRA和PEFT等高效微调技术。此外，我们还研究了llama.cpp，用于在中等配置的CPU实例上运行先进的模型。本研究对比分析了现有的AI编程方法、商业模型与开源LLM，评估了它们的性能、优势与局限性。同时，我们也识别出当前尚缺的工具，并展望了未来可能的发展趋势。我们的研究成果旨在引导软件社区在快速发展的生成式AI编程领域中前行，帮助人们根据自身具体需求、预算和技术经验，选择最合适的解决方案。

title: 4DGS-Craft: Consistent and Interactive 4D Gaussian Splatting Editing
authors: Lei Liu, Can Wang, Zhenghao Chen, Zhenhua Liu, Dong Xu
publish: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: Recent advances in 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) editing still face challenges with view, temporal, and non-editing region consistency, as well as with handling complex text instructions. To address these issues, we propose 4DGS-Craft, a consistent and interactive 4DGS editing framework. We first introduce a 4D-aware InstructPix2Pix model to ensure both view and temporal consistency. This model incorporates 4D VGGT geometry features extracted from the initial scene, enabling it to capture underlying 4D geometric structures during editing. We further enhance this model with a multi-view grid module that enforces consistency by iteratively refining multi-view input images while jointly optimizing the underlying 4D scene. Furthermore, we preserve the consistency of non-edited regions through a novel Gaussian selection mechanism, which identifies and optimizes only the Gaussians within the edited regions. Beyond consistency, facilitating user interaction is also crucial for effective 4DGS editing. Therefore, we design an LLM-based module for user intent understanding. This module employs a user instruction template to define atomic editing operations and leverages an LLM for reasoning. As a result, our framework can interpret user intent and decompose complex instructions into a logical sequence of atomic operations, enabling it to handle intricate user commands and further enhance editing performance. Compared to related works, our approach enables more consistent and controllable 4D scene editing.
title_zh: 4DGS-Craft：一致且交互式的4D高斯点云编辑
abstract_zh: 近年来，4D高斯溅射（4DGS）编辑技术虽取得显著进展，但仍面临视角一致性、时间一致性以及非编辑区域一致性等方面的挑战，同时在处理复杂文本指令时也存在困难。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为4DGS-Craft的一致性与交互式4DGS编辑框架。首先，我们引入一种面向4D的InstructPix2Pix模型，以确保视角和时间上的一致性。该模型融合了从初始场景中提取的4D VGGT几何特征，能够在编辑过程中捕捉潜在的4D几何结构。为进一步提升性能，我们还设计了一个多视角网格模块，通过迭代优化多视角输入图像，联合调整底层4D场景，从而强化一致性。此外，我们提出一种新颖的高斯点选择机制，仅对编辑区域内的高斯点进行识别与优化，有效保持了非编辑区域的稳定性。除了保证一致性外，支持用户交互也是实现高效4DGS编辑的关键。因此，我们设计了一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的用户意图理解模块：该模块采用用户指令模板定义原子编辑操作，并利用LLM进行推理分析。由此，我们的框架能够准确解析用户意图，将复杂的指令分解为逻辑清晰的原子操作序列，从而有效应对复杂的用户命令，进一步提升编辑效果。与现有方法相比，本方法实现了更一致、更可控的4D场景编辑。

title: GLIDE: Generative LLM-Driven Data Augmentation for Meta-Services With Applications to E-Commerce Scenarios
authors: Yudan Lyu, Jingwei Lu, Jinshuo Guo, Zheng Jing, Haoyu Qiu, Junzhe Ouyang, Lefei Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
abstract: In this article, a novel data augmentation method is developed for Meta-Services based on large language models (LLMs) and requirement-functional-logical-physical (RFLP) models, referred to as generative LLM-driven data augmentation (GLIDE), and an application of GLIDE to e-commerce recommendation systems is presented. First, the framework of GLIDE is designed under Meta-Services, including a generalized encoder and decoder architecture, as well as designers, which captures the idea of “designers in the loop” in Meta-Services. Furthermore, the generalized encoder and decoder architecture is established based on RFLP models in systems engineering, aiming to translate requirements and knowledge into prompts and obtain ideal LLM outputs under physical constraints. Subsequently, the application of the GLIDE method to e-commerce recommendation systems is given in detail, which is committed to enriching users’ behavioral data and providing an effective way to decouple data augmentation and recommendation modules. Finally, recommendation experiments are performed on real-world and synthetic behavior data, and the empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our GLIDE method.
title_zh: GLIDE：基于生成式大语言模型的元服务数据增强方法及其在电子商务场景中的应用
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLMs）和需求-功能-逻辑-物理（RFLP）模型的新型数据增强方法，称为生成式LLM驱动的数据增强（GLIDE），并展示了该方法在电子商务推荐系统中的应用。首先，在元服务（Meta-Services）框架下设计了GLIDE的整体架构，包括通用编码器与解码器结构以及“设计师”模块，体现了元服务中“设计师在环路中”的核心理念。其次，基于系统工程中的RFLP模型构建了通用编码器与解码器架构，旨在将需求与知识转化为提示（prompts），并在物理约束条件下获得理想的LLM输出。随后，详细阐述了GLIDE方法在电子商务推荐系统中的具体应用，致力于丰富用户行为数据，并提供一种有效解耦数据增强与推荐模块的途径。最后，基于真实世界和合成的行为数据进行了推荐实验，实证结果验证了所提GLIDE方法的有效性。

title: Agentic AI for Autonomous Defense in Software Supply Chain Security: Beyond Provenance to Vulnerability Mitigation
authors: Toqeer Ali Syed, Mohammad Riyaz Belgaum, Salman Jan, Asadullah Abdullah Khan, Saad Said Alqahtani
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Software supply chain attacks increasingly target trusted development and delivery processes, making conventional post-build integrity mechanisms insufficient. Existing frameworks like SLSA, SBOM, and in-toto mainly provide provenance and traceability but cannot actively identify or remove vulnerabilities during production. This paper presents an agentic AI approach for autonomous software supply chain security, combining large language model (LLM) reasoning, reinforcement learning (RL), and multi-agent coordination. The system employs specialized security agents that interact with CI/CD environments, collaborate intelligently to identify and mitigate threats, and document actions for integrity and auditing. RL enables adaptive mitigation strategies balancing security effectiveness and operational overhead, while LLMs provide semantic vulnerability analysis and explainable decisions. The framework is evaluated on simulated pipelines and actual CI/CD integrations, including injection attacks, insecure deserialization, access control violations, and configuration errors. Results show improved detection accuracy, shorter mitigation latency, and reasonable build-time overhead compared to rule-based, provenance-only, and RL-only baselines, demonstrating that agentic AI can enable proactive, self-defending software supply chains.
title_zh: 面向软件供应链安全的自主防御代理型AI：从来源追溯到漏洞缓解
abstract_zh: 软件供应链攻击日益针对受信任的开发与交付流程，使得传统的构建后完整性保障机制已显不足。现有的框架如SLSA、SBOM和in-toto主要提供来源证明与可追溯性，但无法在生产过程中主动识别或消除漏洞。本文提出一种基于智能体（agentic）AI的自主软件供应链安全方法，融合大型语言模型（LLM）推理、强化学习（RL）以及多智能体协同机制。该系统部署专门的安全部署智能体，与CI/CD环境交互，通过智能协作识别并缓解威胁，同时记录操作日志以保障完整性与审计需求。强化学习使系统能够动态调整缓解策略，在安全有效性与运维开销之间实现平衡；而大型语言模型则提供语义层面的漏洞分析能力，并支持可解释的决策过程。该框架在模拟流水线及实际CI/CD集成环境中进行了评估，涵盖注入攻击、不安全反序列化、访问控制违规和配置错误等多种典型威胁场景。实验结果表明，相较于基于规则、仅依赖来源证明或仅使用强化学习的基线方案，本方法在检测准确率、缓解延迟时间方面均有显著提升，且构建期开销合理，充分证明了智能体AI能够实现主动防御、自我保护的软件供应链安全体系。

title: A Performance Evaluation Approach for Hardware System Based on Neural Networks
authors: Bijing Liu, Li Zhao, Haiteng Hang, Yong Yang, Xiaosong Zhu
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, and Information Processing (AICSIP)
abstract: With the rapid development of information technology, the accuracy of hardware system performance evaluation has become increasingly important. This paper proposes a hardware system performance testing system and its methodology, innovatively integrating the neural network evaluation method with the fuzzy comprehensive evaluation method to effectively address the complexity and uncertainty issues in the hardware system performance evaluation process. Specifically, automated testing tools are first used to collect relevant data of the hardware system, and then a neural network is trained to learn the system performance indicators. On this basis, the fuzzy comprehensive evaluation method is adopted to conduct a comprehensive and objective performance assessment of the system. The evaluation system constructed in this paper can efficiently extract key features from massive data, significantly improving the accuracy and reliability of evaluation. The proposed evaluation method not only provides a new idea for hardware system performance evaluation but also offers theoretical basis and decision-making references for the safe operation and optimization of systems in other key fields.
title_zh: 基于神经网络的硬件系统性能评估方法
abstract_zh: 随着信息技术的快速发展，硬件系统性能评估的准确性日益重要。本文提出了一种硬件系统性能测试系统及其方法，创新性地将神经网络评估方法与模糊综合评价法相结合，有效解决了硬件系统性能评估过程中存在的复杂性和不确定性问题。具体而言，首先利用自动化测试工具采集硬件系统的相关数据，随后通过训练神经网络来学习系统的性能指标；在此基础上，采用模糊综合评价法对系统进行全方位、客观的性能评估。本文构建的评估系统能够高效地从海量数据中提取关键特征，显著提升了评估的准确性和可靠性。所提出的评估方法不仅为硬件系统性能评估提供了新思路，也为其他关键领域系统安全运行与优化提供了理论依据和决策参考。

title: A novel unsupervised method for software defect prediction based on clustering assumption
authors: Shiqi Tang, Xinlan Tie, Minggui Song, Qiao Yang
abstract: Software defect prediction (SDP) is a very important technique used in the software testing. It helps to quickly predict the defects contained in software in the early stage of development. Currently, many SDP methods use machine learning algorithms to build defect prediction models based on historical data. However, due to the lack of historical data that can be used to train the models, unsupervised defect prediction (UDP) methods have been proposed. The instance-violation-score-based-clustering (IVSBC) method is an example of the UDP method. It is relatively effective but vulnerable to redundant features and rough split of the feature space. To reduce those shortcoming, this paper proposes an unsupervised defect prediction method named CLA-CA based on clustering assumption. The CLA-CA searches different regions of every feature space to find an appropriate classification threshold, and remove redundant features, so as to improve the prediction performance. Experiments show that the CLA-CA is not only better than other mainstream UDP methods, but also outperforms most supervised defect prediction methods.
title_zh: 一种基于聚类假设的新型无监督软件缺陷预测方法
abstract_zh: 软件缺陷预测（SDP）是软件测试中一项非常重要的技术，能够帮助在开发早期快速预测软件中可能存在的缺陷。目前，许多SDP方法利用机器学习算法，基于历史数据构建缺陷预测模型。然而，由于缺乏可用于训练模型的历史数据，无监督缺陷预测（UDP）方法应运而生。基于实例违规得分的聚类（IVSBC）方法便是UDP的一种典型代表。尽管该方法相对有效，但仍容易受到冗余特征和特征空间粗略划分的影响。为克服这些缺点，本文提出了一种基于聚类假设的无监督缺陷预测方法——CLA-CA。该方法通过搜索每个特征空间的不同区域，寻找合适的分类阈值，并剔除冗余特征，从而提升预测性能。实验结果表明，CLA-CA不仅优于其他主流的UDP方法，而且在多数情况下也超过了大多数有监督缺陷预测方法。

title: Evaluating the Effectiveness of Deep Learning Models for Foundational Program Analysis Tasks
authors: Qian Chen, Rouyi Chen, Chenyang Yu, Ruyan Liu, Chi Zhang, Yu Wang, Ke Wang, Linzhang Wang
publish: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology

title: Policy-as-Code Auto-Remediation with Human-Centered Explanations
authors: Pragya Keshap, Arpana Hosabettu, Akshay Mittal
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Cloud misconfigurations—such as publicly exposed storage buckets or overly permissive IAM policies—remain a leading cause of security incidents. This paper introduces a policy-as-code framework for automated remediation with human-centered explanations. The system detects violations, synthesizes minimal Terraform patches, and generates didactic diffs that show both the changes and the rationale. A safety checker enforces formal invariants to prevent over-remediation, while a rollback controller ensures reversibility. An observability layer records all actions into logs and metrics, supporting reproducibility and comparative evaluation.Evaluation across 100 synthetic environments demonstrates that the framework achieves an 8× improvement in remediation speed compared to manual intervention, eliminates over-remediation incidents through invariant checking, and scales sub-linearly from 50 to 200 resources. Explanations reduced violation recurrence by nearly half, transforming remediation events into opportunities for operator learning. These results show that remediation can be both automated and explainable.The framework’s modular design and benchmark harness provide a foundation for reproducible research in explainable cloud security, with future work focused on production-scale validation, adaptive explanations, and multi-cloud portability.
title_zh: 基于策略的代码自动修复与以人为本的解释
abstract_zh:
云配置错误——如公开暴露的存储桶或权限过宽的IAM策略——仍是导致安全事件的主要原因。本文提出了一种基于“策略即代码”的自动化修复框架，并附带以用户为中心的解释说明。该系统能够检测配置违规，自动生成最小化的Terraform补丁，并生成具有教学意义的差异对比（didactic diffs），清晰展示变更内容及其背后的原因。一个安全检查器通过强制执行形式化不变量，防止过度修复；同时，回滚控制器确保所有操作均可逆。可观测性层将所有操作记录至日志和指标中，支持结果的可复现性与对比评估。

在100个合成环境中的评估表明，该框架相比人工干预，修复速度提升了8倍；通过不变量检查彻底消除了过度修复问题；且在资源数量从50增至200时，系统表现呈亚线性扩展。解释信息的引入使违规重复发生率几乎降低一半，将修复事件转化为运维人员的学习机会。这些结果表明，自动化修复完全可以兼具可解释性。

该框架采用模块化设计并配备基准测试工具集，为可解释性云安全领域的可复现研究奠定了基础。未来工作将聚焦于生产规模的验证、自适应解释能力的提升以及多云环境下的可移植性。

title: Usage of the Large Action Model in Agentic AI
authors: Pradnya Desai, Ashwini Joshi, Mugdha Kulkarni, Aditya Chincholkar
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Large Action Models (LAMs) are advanced AI systems built for function calling, reasoning, and autonomous planning. These models are developed to reduce the complexity often encountered with large language models (LLMs). LAMs enable seamless integration of AI into workflows by proactively managing tasks and making context-aware decisions without the need for explicit instructions. Unlike traditional LLMs which are good at generating text, LAMs take a more agentic approach like anticipating user needs, automating processes, and executing actions intelligently. Rooted in research areas such as robotics, autonomous systems, and gaming AI, LAMs bring a new level of real-time responsiveness and adaptability to enterprise applications.This session will cover the overview of LAM and survey of Salesforce AI Research’s xLAM and its utilization in Agentic AI for next-generation workflow automation.
title_zh: 大型动作模型在代理型人工智能中的应用
abstract_zh: 大型行动模型（LAMs）是为函数调用、推理和自主规划而构建的先进人工智能系统。这些模型旨在降低大型语言模型（LLMs）通常面临的复杂性问题。LAMs 通过主动管理任务并根据上下文做出智能决策，无需明确指令，从而实现人工智能与工作流程的无缝集成。与传统 LLMs 主要擅长文本生成不同，LAMs 采用更具主动性的方式，例如预判用户需求、自动化流程，并智能地执行操作。其技术基础源于机器人学、自主系统以及游戏 AI 等研究领域，为企业的应用带来了前所未有的实时响应能力和适应性。本次演讲将概述 LAM 的基本概念，并介绍 Salesforce AI 研究团队推出的 xLAM 模型，探讨其在下一代工作流自动化中的代理式人工智能（Agentic AI）应用。

title: Performance Optimization of LLM-Based Agentic Workloads in Kubernetes Environments: Bottlenecks, Root Causes, and Solutions
authors: Akshay Mittal, Goutam Tadi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Large Language Model-based AI agents deployed in Kubernetes containerized environments face unique performance bottlenecks that differ fundamentally from traditional applications. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of critical bottlenecks affecting LLM agent workloads, including GPU memory constraints, container orchestration overhead, storage I/O limitations, and inter-agent communication inefficiencies. Through systematic evaluation of production deployments and optimization strategies, we identify root causes and provide actionable solutions. Our findings demonstrate that proper GPU memory management, storage optimization, and intelligent workload orchestration achieve 2-5x throughput improvements, 33x faster cold starts, and 60
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的智能体工作负载在Kubernetes环境中的性能优化：瓶颈、根本原因及解决方案
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的AI代理在Kubernetes容器化环境中部署时，面临与传统应用截然不同的性能瓶颈。本文对影响LLM代理工作负载的关键瓶颈进行了全面分析，包括GPU内存限制、容器编排开销、存储I/O瓶颈以及代理间通信效率低下等问题。通过系统性评估生产环境中的实际部署情况及优化策略，我们识别出根本原因并提出了可操作的解决方案。研究结果表明，合理的GPU内存管理、存储优化以及智能的工作负载编排，能够实现2至5倍的吞吐量提升，冷启动速度加快33倍，并将延迟降低60%。

title: Advancing LLM Agents for Code Generation: Observability, Orchestration, Reliable Performance
authors: Alex Kaplunovich
publish: 2025 International Conference on Intelligent Computing, Communication, Networking and Services (ICCNS)
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have gained popularity for constructing complex coding pipelines that incorporate multiple tools, iterative processes, and advanced libraries such as LlamaIndex and LangChain. Recognizing the critical need for observability, we emphasize techniques to monitor and control the process, costs, frequency of model calls, prompt usage, and overall logging. While contemporary agent libraries offer foundational classes for these purposes, many online examples and articles still rely on default implementations with ChatGPT models, allowing agents to invoke generative AI methods without robust flow control, prompt management, or detailed application logging. In our research, we identified effective ways to implement essential observability methods for popular frameworks, including LlamaIndex, LangChain, and CreAI. Our approach introduces workflows, custom model calls, comprehensive logging, and enhanced observability, which improve the reliability, controllability, predictability, and efficiency of LLM agents in software development applications. Through this methodology, we enhanced the architecture and structure of the evolving agentic framework for code generation, achieving a notable 98% accuracy in solving challenging coding tasks via specified workflows.
title_zh: 推进大语言模型智能体在代码生成中的应用：可观测性、编排与可靠性能
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理因其在构建包含多种工具、迭代流程及高级库（如 LlamaIndex 和 LangChain）的复杂编码流水线方面的优势，近年来广受欢迎。鉴于可观测性的重要性，我们强调了监控与控制流程、成本、模型调用频率、提示词使用情况以及整体日志记录的技术手段。尽管当前的代理库已提供基础类以实现这些功能，但许多在线示例和文章仍依赖于默认实现，使用 ChatGPT 模型，使代理能够随意调用生成式 AI 方法，而缺乏有效的流程控制、提示词管理以及详细的应用日志记录。在我们的研究中，我们发现了针对 LlamaIndex、LangChain 和 CreAI 等主流框架实施关键可观测性方法的有效途径。我们的方法引入了工作流设计、自定义模型调用、全面的日志记录以及增强的可观测性能力，显著提升了 LLM 代理在软件开发应用中的可靠性、可控性、可预测性和效率。通过这一方法论，我们优化了代码生成领域不断演进的智能体框架的架构与结构，在指定工作流下成功解决了具有挑战性的编程任务，准确率达到了惊人的 98%。

title: Optimized Constant-Time Implementation of terSIDH
authors: Taehun Kang, Donghoe Heo, Jeonghwan Lee, Suhri Kim, Changmin Lee
abstract: Since supersingular isogeny Diffie-Hellman (SIDH) was broken by a polynomial-time attack, several countermeasures were proposed as it was regarded as the most efficient algorithm among isogeny-based cryptosystems. Among them, terSIDH has been highlighted for its high performance, yet it exposes a side-channel vulnerability. The total degree of isogeny depends on the private key; terSIDH exhibits timing variations during computation, making it vulnerable to timing attacks. In this work, we present the first constant-time design for artificially-oriented isogeny protocols, instantiated with terSIDH. By inserting dummy operations, we remove private-key dependencies in isogeny computations and ensure constant execution time. Specifically for terSIDH, our method equalizes per-prime work using dummy kernels and removes secret-dependent branches at the code level. Since constant-time countermeasures typically incur performance overhead, we introduce an additional optimization technique to mitigate this cost. Furthermore, we provide the first 128-bit secure C implementation of terSIDH. Although our focus is on terSIDH, the proposed technique generalizes to related schemes such as binSIDH and the terSIDH-like component of terSIDH-hyb. We compared our method against CSIDH-4096, a representative isogeny-based key exchange protocol with 128-bit security. Our constant-time key generation is 3.3× faster than constant-time CSIDH-4096, and ≈11% faster than terSIDH’s previous worst case.
title_zh: terSIDH的优化常数时间实现
abstract_zh:
自超奇异同源Diffie-Hellman（SIDH）因多项式时间攻击被破解以来，人们提出了多种防御措施，因为SIDH曾被认为是基于同源的密码系统中效率最高的算法。其中，terSIDH因其出色的性能而备受关注，但其存在侧信道漏洞。在terSIDH中，同源的总次数依赖于私钥，导致计算过程中出现时序差异，从而容易受到时序攻击。

本文首次提出一种面向人工设计的同源协议的恒定时间设计方案，并以terSIDH为实例实现。通过插入虚拟操作，我们消除了同源计算中对私钥的依赖，确保了执行时间恒定。具体到terSIDH，我们的方法利用虚拟核使每个素数阶段的工作量保持一致，并在代码层面移除了所有与秘密相关的分支判断。由于恒定时间防护措施通常会带来性能开销，我们进一步引入了一种优化技术以降低该代价。

此外，我们首次实现了128位安全级别的terSIDH的C语言实现。尽管本文重点聚焦于terSIDH，但所提出的方案可推广至相关变体，如binSIDH以及terSIDH-hyb中的terSIDH类组件。

我们将该方案与具有128位安全性的代表性同源密钥交换协议CSIDH-4096进行了对比。结果表明，我们的恒定时间密钥生成速度比恒定时间版CSIDH-4096快3.3倍，且比terSIDH先前最坏情况下的性能快约11%。

title: Smart-Home Security: A Low-Cost Hybrid Security Solution
authors: Omnia Abu Waraga, Manar Abu Talib, Sohail Abbas, Qassim Nasir
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: The rapid proliferation of the Internet of Things (IoT) devices has expedited the adoption of smart home systems; nevertheless, it has introduced many security concerns and challenges. Existing work tackled smart home systems through either monitoring the incoming traffic or assessing the vulnerabilities of the router or gateway, leaving critical security issues when only one aspect is considered. Hence, this paper proposes a hybrid smart home solution that combines vulnerability assessment and network monitoring techniques, a gateway, and home assistant services into a single low-cost chip while maintaining a balance between performance and security. The solution persistently and efficiently assesses the security level of the attached IoT devices and monitors the incoming traffic to prevent external attacks, which improves the security level of the smart home system, on the device level as well as on the network level. Based on the system evaluation of multiple IoT products using vulnerability assessment, attack detection, execution time, and communication overhead, the solution showed feasibility and usability on the resource-constrained devices
title_zh: 智能家居安全：一种低成本的混合安全解决方案
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）设备的迅速普及加速了智能家居系统的应用；然而，这也带来了诸多安全问题与挑战。现有研究通常通过监控入站流量或评估路由器/网关的漏洞来应对智能家居系统，但仅关注单一维度时，仍会遗漏关键的安全隐患。因此，本文提出了一种混合型智能家居解决方案，将漏洞评估、网络监控技术、网关功能以及家庭助理服务集成于一颗低成本芯片中，在性能与安全性之间实现良好平衡。该方案能够持续高效地评估连接的物联网设备的安全水平，并实时监控入站流量以防范外部攻击，从而在设备层面和网络层面均显著提升了智能家居系统的整体安全性。基于对多种物联网产品的系统评估，包括漏洞评估、攻击检测能力、执行时间及通信开销等指标，该方案在资源受限设备上展现出良好的可行性与实用性。

title: CyberGuard: A Deployable Deep Learning Model for Cyber Attacks Threat Detection, and Prevention
authors: Mohamed Wafiq, Ahmed Fahmi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Cyber threats have been exponentially increased by recent advancements in technology, and the vulnerabilities are being exploited by malicious actors to manipulate, steal, destroy or disclose private information. Web applications, especially the ones with sensitive data, are the main targets, and they are continuously attacked through SQL Injection (SQLi), Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), and Phishing. It is not easy to detect these attacks owing to their constantly changing and unclear nature. The present study makes use of deep learning with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM) networks, which are trained on three labeled datasets for SQLi, XSS, and phishing attacks, helping the model to grasp complex temporal dependencies and contextual cues. The end objective is to turn this model into a complete security framework that can protect electronic systems holding confidential information.
title_zh: CyberGuard：一种可部署的深度学习模型，用于网络攻击威胁的检测与预防
abstract_zh: 近年来，技术的迅速发展使网络威胁呈指数级增长，恶意攻击者正利用各种漏洞来操纵、窃取、破坏或泄露私人信息。Web应用程序，尤其是那些处理敏感数据的应用程序，成为主要攻击目标，持续遭受SQL注入（SQLi）、跨站脚本（XSS）和网络钓鱼等攻击。由于这些攻击不断变化且特征模糊，检测难度较大。本研究采用深度学习中的长短期记忆（LSTM）和双向长短期记忆（BiLSTM）网络，基于三个标注好的数据集（分别用于SQLi、XSS和网络钓鱼攻击）进行训练，使模型能够捕捉复杂的时序依赖关系和上下文线索。最终目标是将该模型发展为一个完整的安全框架，以保护存储机密信息的电子系统。

title: Auto Computer – Code generation with VLMs to control a Windows GUI
authors: Rashnan Mohamed Shihab, Ibrahim Thorig
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Innovations in Engineering, Science and Technology for Sustainable Development (ICEST)
abstract: This paper introduces the Auto Computer, an agent architecture that uses a planner-reflector-executor framework with the Qwen2.5VL vision language model to autonomously control Windows 11 GUIs through natural language commands via a custom Agent Computer Interface. Manual evaluation on a custom dataset revealed that while the system successfully process natural language instructions and executes relevant actions, it failed to achieve task completion across all tests due to difficulties in recognizing completed tasks and maintaining continuity. Key insights gained were that the most frequently occurring errors were Screenshot Analysis and Grounded Action generation issues. Despite these issues, the model demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding desktop screenshots and identifying flaws in its own actions, leading the authors to conclude that current VLMs show promise for GUI automation, however they require specialized architecture and dedicated modules for improved visual coherency and precise grounding. One such module is the reflection module which has shown to aid in early trajectory correction and is expected to be a key focus in future architectures aiming to complete GUI based automation tasks.
title_zh: 自动计算机——使用视觉语言模型生成代码以控制Windows图形用户界面
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Auto Computer的智能体架构，该架构采用规划-反思-执行（planner-reflector-executor）框架，并结合Qwen2.5VL视觉语言模型，通过自定义的Agent Computer Interface，能够以自然语言指令自主控制Windows 11图形用户界面。在自建数据集上的手动评估表明，尽管系统能够成功理解自然语言指令并执行相关操作，但在所有测试中均未能完成任务，主要原因是难以识别任务是否已完成以及无法保持任务的连续性。关键发现显示，最常见的错误类型为“截图分析”和“基于上下文的动作生成”问题。尽管存在这些问题，该模型在理解桌面截图以及识别自身行为缺陷方面表现出较强能力。因此，作者得出结论：当前的视觉语言模型（VLMs）在GUI自动化领域具有巨大潜力，但需要专门的架构设计以及专用模块来提升视觉连贯性与动作的精准定位。其中，反思模块已被证明有助于早期轨迹修正，预计将成为未来旨在实现基于GUI自动化任务的智能体架构中的核心研究方向。

title: NeuroSym-FI: A Neuro-Symbolic LLM-Assisted Framework for Explainable Fault Detection in Power Systems
authors: Hassan Mahmoud, Haitham Mahmoud, Jihad M. Al Ja’Am, Moad Idrissi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computer and Applications (ICCA)
abstract: Reliable fault detection remains a cornerstone of safe and efficient power system operation, yet existing artificial intelligence (AI) solutions often face a trade-off between accuracy and interpretability. While deep learning models such as LSTM networks excel in identifying complex fault patterns, their black-box nature limits transparency and trust in real-world deployment. To address this challenge, this paper introduces NeuroSym-FI—a Neuro-Symbolic, Large Language Model (LLM)-assisted Fault Intelligence framework that unites data-driven learning with symbolic reasoning and contextual explanation. The proposed system integrates an LSTM-based temporal model for waveform analysis, a symbolic inference layer for logical validation of detected faults, and a GPT-4o-driven LLM component that generates human-readable, standards-aligned recommendations according to IEC and IEEE protection guidelines. Using the publicly available Electrical Fault Detection and Classification dataset, NeuroSym-FI achieved 98% classification accuracy, a ROC–AUC of 0.995, and a Neuro-Symbolic Consistency Index (NSCI) of 0.93, outperforming traditional Random Forest and KNN-based models. Beyond numerical gains, the framework establishes an interpretable reasoning chain that enhances operator confidence and situational awareness. These findings demonstrate the potential of neuro-symbolic and language-assisted AI to deliver both high performance and explainability in intelligent power grid monitoring and protection systems.
title_zh: NeuroSym-FI：一种基于神经符号大模型的可解释电力系统故障检测框架
abstract_zh: 可靠的故障检测仍是保障电力系统安全高效运行的基石，然而现有的人工智能（AI）解决方案往往在准确性和可解释性之间面临权衡。尽管深度学习模型（如LSTM网络）在识别复杂故障模式方面表现出色，但其“黑箱”特性限制了在实际应用中的透明度与可信度。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种神经符号化、大语言模型（LLM）辅助的故障智能框架——NeuroSym-FI，该框架融合数据驱动学习与符号推理及上下文解释能力。所提出的系统集成了基于LSTM的时序模型用于波形分析、符号推理层以对检测到的故障进行逻辑验证，以及由GPT-4o驱动的LLM组件，能够根据IEC和IEEE保护规范生成人类可读且符合标准的诊断建议。基于公开可用的电气故障检测与分类数据集，NeuroSym-FI实现了98%的分类准确率，ROC-AUC达0.995，神经符号一致性指数（NSCI）为0.93，显著优于传统的随机森林和KNN模型。除了量化性能提升外，该框架还构建了可解释的推理链条，有效增强了运维人员的信心与态势感知能力。研究结果表明，神经符号化与语言模型辅助的人工智能技术在智能电网监测与保护系统中，具备实现高性能与高可解释性双重优势的巨大潜力。

title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Detecting Safety and Reliability Vulnerabilities in Large Language Model-Assisted Healthcare Systems
authors: Abigail Akosua Addobea, Theophilus Siameh, Isaac Obiri Amankona, Jamal. N. A. Hassan, Zhang Miao
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, and Information Processing (AICSIP)
abstract: The integration of large language models into the telemedicine industry has revolutionized digital health by promoting effective clinical decision-making and patient interactions. However, the deployment of LLMS in healthcare imposes critical risks to health data. Moreover, the existing standards of vulnerability detection lack the practical approach to dynamic and enhanced interactions in context-dependent healthcare systems. To overcome these potential hurdles, this paper presents a Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) framework explicitly designed to detect and mitigate vulnerabilities in LLM-assisted healthcare applications. The proposed HRL model decomposes clinical interactions into hierarchical tasks, enabling efficient modeling of complex, multi-step clinical reasoning and nuanced conversational dynamics. Our approach integrates safety-aware reward engineering and policy trajectory analysis to systematically identify risky LLM behaviors. Experimental validation using realistic clinical scenarios demonstrates that our HRLbased approach significantly outperforms conventional methods, providing robust detection of safety and reliability vulnerabilities in healthcare LLM systems.
title_zh: 基于层次化强化学习的大型语言模型辅助医疗系统安全与可靠性漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLM）融入远程医疗行业，已通过促进有效的临床决策和患者互动，彻底革新了数字健康领域。然而，LLM在医疗领域的部署也对健康数据带来了重大风险。此外，现有的漏洞检测标准在应对情境依赖型医疗系统中动态且增强的交互方面，缺乏切实可行的方法。为克服这些潜在挑战，本文提出了一种专门设计用于检测和缓解LLM辅助医疗应用漏洞的分层强化学习（HRL）框架。所提出的HRL模型将临床交互分解为多层次任务，从而能够高效建模复杂的多步骤临床推理过程以及细微的对话动态。我们的方法结合了安全感知的奖励工程与策略轨迹分析，系统性地识别出存在风险的LLM行为。通过真实临床场景的实验验证表明，基于HRL的方法显著优于传统方法，在医疗LLM系统中能够有效检测出安全性与可靠性方面的漏洞，展现出强大的鲁棒性。

title: RTL Information Tracker and its Applications in Quantifying the Security Impact of HLS Optimizations
authors: Nilotpola Sarma, Sunny Priyadarshi, Chandan Karfa
publish: 2026 39th International Conference on VLSI Design &amp; 25th International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) offers several optimization strategies that enable performance optimization of generated circuits. However a few recent works highlight the security vulnerabilities introduced by such optimizations, threatening the integrity and confidentiality of security-critical hardware designs generated by HLS. In this work, we first develop an automated method that uses model checking in the background to track the information flow in Register Transfer Level (RTL) design. We then evaluate the trustworthiness of HLS-generated cryptographic hardware at the RTL using this tool. Specifically, we systematically investigate how different HLS pragma optimizations affect information leakage in cryptographic hardware. The tool takes a cryptographic algorithm in software and applies various pragma-directives (for optimization) and synthesizes them using HLS tool to generate the corresponding Verilog implementations at RTL. By analyzing the propagation of sensitive inputs in each design generated with a set of pragmas, it quantifies the information leakage associated with each set of optimizations corresponding to the pragmas. Our results provide insights into methods for securing HLS-generated cryptographic hardware against information leakage. The tool is fully automated, enabling scalable leakage detection across large RTL designs.
title_zh: RTL信息追踪及其在量化HLS优化安全影响中的应用
abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）提供了多种优化策略，能够有效提升生成电路的性能。然而，近期一些研究指出，这些优化措施可能引入安全漏洞，对由HLS生成的安全关键硬件设计的完整性与机密性构成威胁。在本工作中，我们首先开发了一种自动化方法，利用模型检测技术在后台追踪寄存器传输级（RTL）设计中的信息流。随后，我们使用该工具对HLS生成的密码学硬件在RTL层面的可信度进行评估。具体而言，我们系统地研究了不同HLS pragma优化对密码学硬件中信息泄露的影响。该工具将软件中的密码算法作为输入，应用多种pragma指令（用于优化），并通过HLS工具综合生成相应的Verilog RTL实现。通过对每组pragma优化所生成的设计中敏感输入传播路径的分析，该工具量化了每组优化（对应特定pragma）所带来的信息泄露程度。我们的实验结果为防范HLS生成的密码学硬件面临的信息泄露问题提供了重要启示。该工具完全自动化，可扩展性强，适用于大型RTL设计中的泄漏检测。

title: Ising Placer: A Novel Framework for Placement Based on Ising Machine with Error-Correcting Multi-Stage Annealing
authors: Peng Wei, Hongyu Zhao, Wei Liu
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: As conventional placement algorithms face growing challenges, Ising machines offer a promising path for accelerating electronic design automation (EDA). This brief proposes a novel Ising model-based placement framework utilizing a Sequence-Pair (SP) to spin-matrix mapping, a custom Hamiltonian for constraints and wirelength, and an Error-Correcting Flipping with Multi-Stage Annealing (ECF-MSA) mechanism to ensure solution validity. Validated on an Ising machine simulator, our framework, when compared to state-of-the-art commercial and academic PCB placement tools, reduces routed wirelength by 8-18% with an estimated 37x to over 431x speedup on future hardware. This work demonstrates the significant potential of physics-based computing for complex EDA problems.
title_zh: 伊辛放置：一种基于带有纠错多阶段退火的伊辛机的放置新框架
abstract_zh: 随着传统布局算法面临日益严峻的挑战，伊辛机为加速电子设计自动化（EDA）提供了极具前景的解决方案。本文提出了一种基于伊辛模型的新型布局框架，该框架采用序列对（SP）到自旋矩阵的映射方法，设计了针对约束条件和布线长度的定制哈密顿量，并引入纠错翻转与多阶段退火（ECF-MSA）机制以保证解的有效性。在伊辛机模拟器上的验证结果表明，相较于当前最先进的商业及学术级PCB布局工具，本框架可将布通线长减少8%至18%，并在未来硬件上实现约37倍至431倍以上的加速。本研究充分展示了基于物理计算在解决复杂EDA问题方面的巨大潜力。

title: Unleashing the Potential of Coverage Representation in Deep Learning-Based Fault Localization
authors: Jinping Wang, Yan Lei, Huan Xie, Chunyan Liu
abstract:
Fault localization (FL) aims to identify suspicious statements in faulty programs that may lead to program failure. Coverage representation, which includes code coverage trace and test outcomes, has proven effective in FL and is widely adopted in deep learning-based fault localization (DLFL) methods. However, we find that the potential of coverage representation in deep learning-based fault localization (DLFL) methods is inadequately unleashed (i.e., in the case of using pure coverage representation) since DLFL has exhibited inferior performance compared to traditional non-deep learning-based fault localization (Non-DLFL).

Thus, we conduct systematic analyses by the three key steps of the DLFL task process: data-model-strategy. These analyses reveal that existing methodologies fail to handle three key scale variations in DLFL: sample scale of data, feature scale of model, and task scale of strategy. To address these challenges, we propose Muser, a multi-scale-aware deep learning-based fault localization method based on the data-model-strategy framework to unleash the potential of coverage representation in DLFL. Specifically, Muser addresses the three scale variations through a hierarchical design: for the sample scale, Muser employs a sample-scale-aware data augmentation method that dynamically selects optimal methods based on the sample size to mitigate class imbalance; for the feature scale, Muser uses a proposed feature-scale-aware adaptive LSTM backbone with model sizing adjustments to handle varying feature dimensionality in coverage representations; for the task scale, Muser further employs task-scale-aware modeling strategies to enhance robustness across diverse fault localization scenarios, thereby systematically improving model adaptability and performance. We conduct large-scale experiments to evaluate Muser, and the results show that Muser significantly improves pure coverage-based DLFL performance, e.g., the data augmentation method and the backbone neural network outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines (i.e., PRAM and RNN-FL) by 12.41% and 94.44% on average in Top-1 metrics, respectively.
title_zh: 深度学习故障定位中覆盖率表示潜力的释放
abstract_zh:
故障定位（Fault Localization, FL）旨在识别可能导致程序失败的可疑代码语句。代码覆盖信息（包括代码覆盖轨迹和测试结果）在FL中已被证明具有有效性，并广泛应用于基于深度学习的故障定位（Deep Learning-based Fault Localization, DLFL）方法中。然而，我们发现，在仅使用纯覆盖表示的情况下，DLFL方法未能充分释放覆盖表示的潜力，导致其性能相较于传统的非深度学习故障定位方法（Non-DLFL）表现较差。

因此，我们通过DLFL任务流程中的三个关键环节——数据（data）、模型（model）与策略（strategy）进行了系统性分析。这些分析揭示了现有方法在处理DLFL中的三个关键尺度变化方面存在不足：数据样本规模、模型特征规模以及任务策略规模。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了Muser，一种基于“数据-模型-策略”框架的多尺度感知型深度学习故障定位方法，旨在充分挖掘覆盖表示在DLFL中的潜在能力。

具体而言，Muser通过分层设计解决上述三种尺度变化：针对样本规模，Muser采用一种样本规模感知的数据增强方法，能够根据样本数量动态选择最优增强策略，以缓解类别不平衡问题；针对特征规模，Muser引入了一种新型的特征规模感知自适应LSTM主干网络，并结合模型尺寸自适应调整机制，有效应对覆盖表示中特征维度的变化；针对任务规模，Muser进一步采用任务规模感知的建模策略，提升模型在多样化故障定位场景下的鲁棒性，从而系统性地增强模型的适应能力与整体性能。

我们开展了大规模实验对Muser进行评估，结果表明，Muser显著提升了基于纯覆盖信息的DLFL性能。例如，在Top-1指标上，其数据增强方法和主干神经网络分别较当前最先进的基线方法（即PRAM和RNN-FL）平均提升了12.41%和94.44%。
